- [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.keyboard_mastery_celebration: `KeyboardMasteryCelebration` (renderer `src/renderer/components/KeyboardMasteryCelebration.tsx`, 350 LOC, 0 IPC, 0 Electron-only API per pre-flight grep) lifted verbatim into `src/webFull/components/KeyboardMasteryCelebration.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/KeyboardMasteryCelebration.parity.test.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-keyboard-mastery` (leaf-parade lift wave). **Unblocks the `AppOverlays` `keyboardMasterySlot` deferral** documented in `ISC-44.layer-2.5.app_overlays` (closed earlier 2026-06-08 on branch `leaf-app-overlays`). The L2.5 `AppOverlays` dispatcher accepts `keyboardMasterySlot: ReactNode | null` and renders it gated on `pendingKeyboardMasteryLevel !== null`; the slot was a deferral because the underlying component was renderer-only at the time. With this lift landed, the host wiring layer can either pass `<KeyboardMasteryCelebration ... />` directly into `AppOverlays`'s `keyboardMasterySlot` or keep the render-prop indirection (host's call ŌĆö either choice is host-local and the dispatcher contract is stable). Second of the three overlays referenced in `AppOverlays.tsx`'s file header to land in webFull (after `FirstRunCelebration` @ `fd9bc3cf9`); `StandingOvationOverlay` remains deferred for a separate brief on account of its `window.maestro.shell.openExternal` callsite. Pre-flight `grep -E "window\.maestro\.|from ['\"]electron['\"]" src/renderer/components/KeyboardMasteryCelebration.tsx` ŌåÆ empty (exit 1). The component touches none of the banned surface; all input is via the prop bag (`theme`, `level`, `onClose`, optional `shortcuts`, optional `disableConfetti`) and all side effects are the `canvas-confetti` burst on mount + on-close, the layer-stack registration (`MODAL_PRIORITIES.KEYBOARD_MASTERY` = 1095, focusTrap: 'strict'), the `keydown` listener for Enter / Escape dismissal, and the `onClose()` callback the host wires. **Import-path adapts (seven, all matching L2.5 precedent):** `Theme` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/theme-types'` (standard L2.5 swap); `Shortcut` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/types'` directly (the interface lives in the renderer types barrel only ŌĆö `src/renderer/types/index.ts` ŌĆö and is not yet replicated to `src/shared/`; matches the L2.5 `ShortcutsHelpModal` / `GroupChatHeader` precedent of pulling specific types from the canonical renderer aggregator; `Shortcut` is a pure data shape with no transitive `window.maestro` references); `useLayerStack` resolves to the webFull-side context at `src/webFull/contexts/LayerStackContext.tsx` (lifted in L2.1); `MODAL_PRIORITIES` resolves via the webFull re-export at `src/webFull/constants/modalPriorities.ts` (audit risk A non-divergent re-export); `KEYBOARD_MASTERY_LEVELS` from `'../constants/keyboardMastery'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/constants/keyboardMastery'` (pure data ŌĆö level definitions `{ id, name, threshold, description }`, zero IPC at module load ŌĆö matches the L2.5 `ShortcutsHelpModal` precedent of pulling non-divergent renderer constants directly by relative path rather than duplicating into `src/shared/`); `DEFAULT_SHORTCUTS` from `'../constants/shortcuts'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/constants/shortcuts'` (same rationale, pure data); `isMacOSPlatform` resolves to the webFull-side shim at `src/webFull/utils/platformUtils.ts` (`navigator.userAgent`-based instead of the renderer's `window.maestro.platform` preload bridge). The component's local `formatShortcutKeys(keys: string[], isMac: boolean)` helper is preserved verbatim from the renderer source ŌĆö it takes a `(keys, isMac)` signature and joins without a separator (e.g. `['Meta', '/']` ŌåÆ `'Ōīś/'`), which is a different signature from the webFull `shortcutFormatter` shim's `formatShortcutKeys(keys, separator?)`. Keeping the helper local preserves source fidelity (renderer uses this no-separator form intentionally for the shortcut hint copy "Press Ōīś/ to see all shortcuts"). **Composition shape:** large celebration modal ŌĆö does NOT compose the L2.1 `Modal` primitive directly because the renderer source builds bespoke DOM chrome (dark backdrop at z-index 99997, gradient header glow, animated bouncing icon, level-progress dot row, music-themed confetti palette with per-level intensity scaling ŌĆö 50/100/200/300/500 particles for levels 0-4, gradient dismiss button, level-specific message swap between `Keyboard` + "Level Up!" for levels 0-3 and `Trophy` + "Keyboard Maestro!" for level 4). Confetti `zIndex` stays at 99998 (between backdrop and modal). Maestro variant (`level === 4`) fires an extra delayed 100-particle gold-star burst at 300ms after mount. All confetti calls honour `prefers-reduced-motion` AND the `disableConfetti` prop. All timeouts are tracked in `timeoutsRef` and cleared on unmount to avoid leaking timers. Layer-stack registration uses `MODAL_PRIORITIES.KEYBOARD_MASTERY` (1095, just below `STANDING_OVATION` at 1100) with `focusTrap: 'strict'` and routes Escape to `handleClose()`. Celebration-on-close pattern: clicking the dismiss button (or pressing Enter/Escape) sets `isClosing`, fires a second confetti burst, then calls `onClose()` after an 800ms animation delay. The Continue button label flips to "Onwards!" during the `isClosing` window ŌĆö preserved verbatim from the renderer source. **Parity catalog (`src/webFull/components/KeyboardMasteryCelebration.parity.test.ts`, 10 stories: 5 happy + 5 negative ŌĆö meets brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor; 6 catalog-shape vitest guards):** happy-path stories cover the standard "Level Up!" variation chrome (dialog with the canonical `aria-label="Keyboard Mastery Level Up"`, level name + description from `KEYBOARD_MASTERY_LEVELS`, Continue button), the next-level encouragement copy "Keep using shortcuts to reach <next>" with dismiss hint, the level-progression dot row rendering, the Maestro variation at `level === 4` swapping title to "Keyboard Maestro!" + "the highest level" subhead + "You've mastered all keyboard shortcuts!" encouragement copy, and the level=0 boundary case (Beginner tier ŌĆö pin against future refactors that use `if (level)` instead of explicit `level === 4`). Negative-path stories cover Continue button ŌåÆ unmounts the dialog after the 800ms close-animation, Escape key ŌåÆ same close path via layer-stack `onEscape`, backdrop click ŌåÆ close (with the card's `onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}` preserved so card-clicks DO NOT close), no "Keep using shortcuts to reach the next level" copy at Maestro (the next-level branch must NOT render at level 4), and no "Level Up!" title at Maestro (the standard branch must NOT render at level 4). Uses only the allowed assertion vocabulary; 6/6 in-suite catalog-shape vitest guards green. **Scope guards verified:** `src/web/` + `src/renderer/` + `src/main/` + `src/server/` untouched (`git diff main..HEAD -- src/web/ src/renderer/ src/main/ src/server/ | wc -c` ŌåÆ 0). Renderer-side consumers (the `?` / `Meta+/` shortcut handler that surfaces the celebration when crossing a level boundary, and the `useModalStore` reducer that tracks `keyboardMasteryData`) are NOT touched ŌĆö feature wiring into the webFull tree is a downstream-layer concern (consumer needs the level-transition source wired against the webFull modal-data prop drilling, which is part of the deferred `AppOverlays` host-wiring brief). See Decisions 2026-06-08 ("Layer 2.5 leaf-parade ŌĆö `KeyboardMasteryCelebration` lift; unblocks `AppOverlays`'s `keyboardMasterySlot` deferral").
- [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.thinking_status_pill: `ThinkingStatusPill` (renderer `src/renderer/components/ThinkingStatusPill.tsx`, 586 LOC, 0 module-load IPC, 0 Electron-only module-load API per pre-flight grep `grep -n "window\.maestro\|window\.electron\|ipcRenderer\|window\.api" src/renderer/components/ThinkingStatusPill.tsx` ŌåÆ empty) lifted verbatim into `src/webFull/components/ThinkingStatusPill.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/ThinkingStatusPill.parity.test.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-thinking-status-pill` (leaf-parade lift wave). Pure UI primitive that multiplexes three observable shapes: (1) AutoRun mode (renders the internal `AutoRunPill` sub-component when `autoRunState?.isRunning` is true ŌĆö surfacing total elapsed time + `<completed>/<total>` task counter + optional lucide `GitBranch` worktree indicator + optional Stop button), (2) thinking mode (renders the centred pill above the input area showing the primary item's Maestro session name, token count or "Thinking..." placeholder, elapsed time, Claude session ID / custom name / tab name button, and a hover-gated `+N` overflow dropdown when more than one tab is thinking), (3) idle mode (renders `null`). **Active-session priority preserved:** when multiple tabs are thinking, the pill picks the item whose `session.id === activeSessionId` as the primary (so the Stop button targets the session the user is viewing), falling back to `thinkingItems[0]` when no active session is in the busy set. **Import-path adapts (three, all matching established L2.5 precedent):** `Theme` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/theme-types'` (standard L2.5 swap ŌĆö webFull has no `types/` aggregator); `Session, AITab, BatchRunState, ThinkingItem` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/types'` (precedent: `GroupChatPanel.tsx`, `ShortcutEditor.tsx`, `KeyboardMasteryCelebration.tsx`, `GroupChatHeader.tsx` ŌĆö non-divergent type aggregators stay re-imported from renderer per Architect 2026-06-08 audit risk A, the four types are pure data shapes with no transitive `window.maestro` references); `formatTokensCompact` from `'../utils/formatters'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/utils/formatters'` (precedent: `MarkdownRenderer.tsx` re-imports `getSyntaxStyle`, `remarkFileLinks`, `remarkFrontmatterTable`, `markdownConfig` from `'../../renderer/utils/'` ŌĆö same pattern for pure utility re-imports, the helper is a deterministic number ŌåÆ string formatter with no IPC surface). **Composition shape:** three file-local `React.memo`d sub-components preserved verbatim (`ElapsedTimeDisplay`, `ThinkingItemRow`, `AutoRunPill`); the custom `memo` comparator at the export site (which skips re-render unless one of the documented session-level / tab-level / namedSessions / activeSessionId / theme / autoRunState properties changes) is preserved verbatim ŌĆö it is part of the observable performance contract for the high-frequency thinking-status re-renders. The `setInterval` inside `ElapsedTimeDisplay` (1Hz tick) is cleaned up via the documented `useEffect` cleanup. The `lucide-react` `GitBranch` icon is the only third-party dep, already a webFull-tree dep. **No layer-stack registration, no Modal composition, no Escape-handling** ŌĆö the pill is inline transcript chrome rendered above the input area; all side effects are threaded out via the `onSessionClick`, `onStopAutoRun`, and `onInterrupt` callback props. **Theme access pattern:** keeps the renderer's `theme: Theme` prop convention. Parity catalog ships 10 stories total (5 happy + 5 negative ŌĆö exceeds the brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor) with 6 catalog-shape vitest guards (happy floor, negative-per-happy floor, allowed-verbs, non-empty given/when/then, unique-names, IPC-leakage guard). Happy paths cover: session-name + "Thinking..." placeholder when `currentCycleTokens=0`; "Tokens:" + `formatTokensCompact`-shaped count when tokens are positive (and the placeholder is suppressed); "Elapsed:" + `0m`-anchored time string when `thinkingStartTime` is set; active-session priority surfacing the `activeSessionId` item as the primary even when not first in the array (with the `+1` overflow indicator for the non-primary item); AutoRun pill replacing the thinking pill when `autoRunState?.isRunning` is true (with "AutoRun" label + "Tasks:" + "3/7" progress + "Elapsed:" label). Negative paths cover: null-render when `thinkingItems=[]` AND no AutoRun; `+N` indicator suppression when only one item thinks; Stop-button suppression when `onInterrupt` is not provided (`button[title="Interrupt Claude (Ctrl+C)"]` absence); "AutoRun Stopping..." label + "Stopping" button copy when `isStopping=true`; Stop button suppression in the AutoRun pill when `onStopAutoRun` is not provided. Uses only the allowed assertion vocabulary; the IPC-leakage guard pins the banned-target list (`window.maestro`, `shell.openpath`, `dialog.`, `tunnel.`, `ipcrenderer`). Renderer-side consumers (the AI tab chrome that mounts the pill above the input area) are NOT touched ŌĆö feature wiring into the webFull tree is a downstream-layer concern. `src/web/` + `src/renderer/` + `src/main/` untouched (additive lift only ŌĆö barrel export added, no patches to upstream files). `npm run lint` clean (after `npm run build:prompts` to materialize the pre-existing `src/generated/prompts.ts`). `npx vitest run src/webFull/components/ThinkingStatusPill.parity.test.ts` ŌåÆ 6/6 catalog-shape tests passed. Not pushed per brief ŌĆö branch sits locally at `leaf-thinking-status-pill`, awaiting Trillium's merge. See Decisions 2026-06-08 ("Layer 2.5 leaf-parade ŌĆö `ThinkingStatusPill` lift").
- [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.standing_ovation_overlay: `StandingOvationOverlay` (renderer `src/renderer/components/StandingOvationOverlay.tsx`, 654 LOC, 1 IPC at the badge external-link click handler ŌĆö `window.maestro.shell.openExternal` at renderer line 498, classified by Architect audit #9 as event-handler-deferred NOT module-load) lifted into `src/webFull/components/StandingOvationOverlay.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/StandingOvationOverlay.parity.test.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-standing-ovation`. **Closes the LAST deferred slot in `AppOverlays`** ŌĆö third and final of the three overlays referenced in `AppOverlays.tsx`'s file header (`FirstRunCelebration` landed @ `fd9bc3cf9`; `KeyboardMasteryCelebration` closed earlier 2026-06-08 on branch `leaf-keyboard-mastery`; both lifts explicitly named `StandingOvationOverlay` as deferred on account of its `window.maestro.shell.openExternal` callsite). With this lift landed, the host wiring layer can either pass `<StandingOvationOverlay ... />` directly into `AppOverlays`'s `standingOvationSlot` or keep the render-prop indirection (host's call ŌĆö either choice is host-local and the dispatcher contract is stable). Pre-flight `grep -nE "window\.maestro\.|from ['\"]electron['\"]|shell\.openExternal|shell\.openPath|ipcRenderer" src/renderer/components/StandingOvationOverlay.tsx` returned exactly one match (line 498). **Audit decision: `openExternal ŌåÆ window.open` swap.** The renderer source's single IPC call is inside the `onClick` handler for the "Learn more on Wikipedia" anchor on the Example Maestro card. Event-handler-deferred, not module-load, not useEffect. The brief's pre-flight notes the audit specifically calls out this site uses the `window.open(url, '_blank')` swap pattern established by the `MarkdownRenderer` lift's file header (which catalogues ŌĆö but preserves verbatim ŌĆö three lambda-deferred `window.maestro.shell.*` calls, and explicitly names `window.open(href)` as the swap downstream consumers can use). This lift does the swap inline rather than preserve verbatim. Rationale: (1) the webFull bundle's runtime has no `window.maestro` preload bridge ŌĆö the renderer call would throw `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'shell')` on first click with no catch handler, which would mean the LAST deferred slot in `AppOverlays` would carry a known-broken click handler into production. (2) `window.open(url, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer')` is the security-hardened form documented in OWASP / MDN ŌĆö `noopener` prevents reverse-tabnabbing against the host, `noreferrer` suppresses the Referer header. Both flags are appropriate for external content links and match the form a hand-written browser anchor `target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"` produces. (3) The audit notes this is the ONE site the swap applies to ŌĆö no other `window.maestro` call exists in this component. The semantic contract preserved: clicking the external-link button opens the badge's `wikipediaUrl` in a new browser context. The Electron renderer surfaces this via the OS shell handler; webFull surfaces it via the browser's native popup-window API. Both round-trip to "render the URL in a separate top-level browser context." **Import-path adapts (six, all matching established L2.5 precedent):** `Theme`, `ThemeMode` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/theme-types'` (standard L2.5 swap ŌĆö webFull has no `types/` aggregator); `ConductorBadge`, `formatCumulativeTime`, `formatTimeRemaining`, `getNextBadge` from `'../constants/conductorBadges'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/constants/conductorBadges'` (pure data + pure helpers, zero IPC at module load ŌĆö matches the L2.5 `AppOverlays` precedent of pulling the badge module directly by relative path rather than duplicating into `src/shared/`); `useLayerStack` from `'../contexts/LayerStackContext'` resolves to the webFull-side context at `src/webFull/contexts/LayerStackContext.tsx` (lifted in L2.1; same path string, different module under webFull's tsconfig); `MODAL_PRIORITIES` from `'../constants/modalPriorities'` resolves via the webFull re-export at `src/webFull/constants/modalPriorities.ts` (audit risk A non-divergent re-export ŌĆö uses `MODAL_PRIORITIES.STANDING_OVATION` = 1100, top tier, just above `KEYBOARD_MASTERY` at 1095); `AnimatedMaestro` from `'./MaestroSilhouette'` resolves to the webFull-side L2.5 `MaestroSilhouette` lift (closed at ISC-44.layer-2.5.maestro_silhouette); `safeClipboardWriteBlob` from `'../utils/clipboard'` resolves to the webFull-side L2.5 clipboard util at `src/webFull/utils/clipboard.ts` (closed at ISC-44.layer-2.5.clipboard_util ŌĆö pure `navigator.clipboard.write`, no IPC). **Composition shape:** large celebration modal ŌĆö does NOT compose the L2.1 `Modal` primitive because the renderer source builds bespoke DOM chrome (dark backdrop at z-index 99997, confetti at z-index 99998, modal at z-index 99999 with gold border, scaled-in zoom transition, gradient header glow, animated bouncing `Trophy` icon, animated maestro silhouette with drop-shadow filter, level + badge name display, flavor-text italic copy, Example Maestro card with the Wikipedia external-link affordance, two-column stats grid, optional next-level info row, primary Take a Bow gradient button, Share Achievement secondary button with pop-up share menu ŌĆö Copy to Clipboard + Save as Image, optional Join Global Leaderboard CTA gated on `onOpenLeaderboardRegistration && !isLeaderboardRegistered`). Layer-stack registration uses `MODAL_PRIORITIES.STANDING_OVATION` (1100) with `focusTrap: 'strict'` and routes Escape to `handleTakeABow()`. **Confetti behavior (preserved verbatim):** fires on mount (3-burst: center, left, right, all from y=1) and on close (same 3-burst), 500 particles, 91-degree spread, `disableForReducedMotion: true`, 8-colour palette. Confetti `zIndex` stays at 99998 (between backdrop and modal). All confetti calls honour `prefers-reduced-motion` AND the `disableConfetti` prop. **Canvas share image generation (preserved verbatim):** `generateShareImage()` synthesises a 600x400 PNG card using Canvas2D ŌĆö theme-aware background gradient (rgba-stripped via `ensureSolidColor`), gold border + header gradient + trophy circle, "STANDING OVATION" title, achievement-type sub-line, level badge row, badge name, flavor text (word-wrapped via the local `wrapText` helper), two-column stats box, footer branding. Output is consumed by `copyToClipboard` (via `canvas.toBlob` + `ClipboardItem({ 'image/png': blob })` through the webFull-side `safeClipboardWriteBlob` shim) and by `downloadImage` (via `canvas.toDataURL('image/png')` + a synthetic anchor click). Both paths are pure browser APIs ŌĆö no IPC required. **Verbatim-fidelity emoji note:** the source ships three emoji glyphs ŌĆö Trophy fill in the canvas share image, star glyphs flanking the level badge row in the canvas share image, and party-popper glyphs flanking the Take a Bow button label during the `isClosing` window. Per the brief's hard rule "no emojis," these would normally be stripped from new content; the verbatim-lift rule supersedes here (matching the `FirstRunCelebration` lift's documented precedent ŌĆö changing source text would create silent parity drift against the renderer oracle). **Parity catalog (`src/webFull/components/StandingOvationOverlay.parity.test.ts`, 10 stories: 5 happy + 5 negative ŌĆö exceeds brief's ">=3 happy + >=1 negative-per-happy" floor; 7 catalog-shape vitest guards):** happy-path stories cover the standard "Achievement Unlocked!" variation chrome (canonical aria-label "Standing Ovation Achievement", STANDING OVATION title, Take a Bow + Share Achievement CTAs), the badge info + stats grid (level row, badge name as H2, description, flavor text, Total AutoRun stat label), the Example Maestro card rendering with Wikipedia external-link affordance (the brief's required "story exercising the badge-click swap behavior" ŌĆö pinned via the `Learn more on Wikipedia` observable affordance, NOT via assertions about `window.open` vs `shell.openExternal` since the catalog tests observable behavior not implementation detail), the new-record variation @ `isNewRecord=true` flipping sub-line to "New Personal Record!" + stat label to "New Record", and the leaderboard CTA visible when not registered. Negative-path stories cover Take a Bow ŌåÆ unmounts the dialog after the 1500ms close-animation, Escape ŌåÆ same close path via layer-stack `onEscape`, backdrop click ŌåÆ close (with the card's `onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}` preserved so card-clicks DO NOT close), leaderboard CTA HIDDEN when already registered, and the standard-variation boundary pin (standard variation surfaces "Longest Run" label + "Achievement Unlocked!" sub-line + the absence of "New Personal Record!" ŌĆö guards against future refactors that always render the gold-record label). Includes a **catalog-shape IPC-leakage guard** (asserts no story mentions `window.maestro` / `shell.openexternal` / `shell.openpath` / `tunnel.` ŌĆö pins that the catalog tests observable behavior, not the swap implementation) and a **badge-click swap pinning guard** (asserts the wikipedia-affordance story exists and is a happy-path story so a future refactor that strips the affordance fails both the per-story assertion and the meta-guard). Uses only the allowed assertion vocabulary; 7/7 in-suite vitest guards green. **Scope guards verified:** `src/web/` + `src/renderer/` + `src/main/` + `src/server/` untouched (`git diff main..HEAD -- src/web/ src/renderer/ src/main/ src/server/ | wc -c` ŌåÆ 0). Renderer-side consumers (the `useModalStore` reducer that tracks `standingOvationData`, the Auto Run completion handler that mounts this overlay when a badge unlocks) are NOT touched ŌĆö feature wiring into the webFull tree is a downstream-layer concern (consumer needs the badge-unlock source wired against the webFull modal-data prop drilling, which is part of the deferred `AppOverlays` host-wiring brief). See Decisions 2026-06-08 ("Layer 2.5 leaf-parade ŌĆö `StandingOvationOverlay` lift; closes the LAST deferred slot in `AppOverlays`").
- [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.lightbox_modal: `LightboxModal` (renderer `src/renderer/components/LightboxModal.tsx`, 256 LOC, 0 module-load IPC, 0 Electron-only module-load API per pre-flight grep `grep -n "window\.maestro\|window\.electron\|ipcRenderer\|window\.api" src/renderer/components/LightboxModal.tsx` ŌåÆ empty) lifted verbatim into `src/webFull/components/LightboxModal.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/LightboxModal.parity.test.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-lightbox-modal` (leaf-parade lift wave). Pure UI primitive composing the L2.1 `ConfirmModal` for the destructive delete-image confirmation and registering with the LayerStack at `MODAL_PRIORITIES.LIGHTBOX` so Escape-handling cascades correctly with parent overlays. **Import-path adapts** (matching the L2.5 precedent set by `DeleteAgentConfirmModal`, `CollapsibleJsonViewer`, and `QueuedItemsList`): `useLayerStack` from `'../contexts/LayerStackContext'` (now resolves to the webFull L2.1 LayerStack lift), `MODAL_PRIORITIES` from `'../constants/modalPriorities'` (webFull re-export shim at `src/webFull/constants/modalPriorities.ts` ŌĆö non-divergent constants stay re-exported per Architect 2026-06-08 audit risk A), `ConfirmModal` from `'./ConfirmModal'` (webFull L2.1 primitive), `Theme` from `'../../shared/theme-types'` (standard L2.5 swap ŌĆö webFull has no `types/` aggregator), `formatShortcutKeys` from `'../utils/shortcutFormatter'` (webFull-side mirror of the renderer API), and `safeClipboardWriteImage` from `'../../renderer/utils/clipboard'` (re-import precedent set by `GroupChatMessages` for the sibling `safeClipboardWrite` text-only function). **Runtime-only Electron branch documented but out-of-scope for the parity contract:** `safeClipboardWriteImage` internally optional-chains `window.maestro?.shell?.copyImageToClipboard`; on webFull `window.maestro` is undefined and the implementation falls through to the browser `navigator.clipboard.write()` path via `fetch(dataUrl) ŌåÆ blob() ŌåÆ ClipboardItem`. That branch is library-internal to `clipboard.ts` and is NOT part of `LightboxModal`'s observable contract ŌĆö the parity catalog asserts only the copy-button UX (icon swap + "Copied!" confirmation), not the underlying transport. **Composition shape:** mounts a full-bleed `<div role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Image Lightbox">` overlay with `absolute inset-0 z-[100] bg-black/90`; renders the expanded image centred; renders left/right arrow buttons when `stagedImages.length > 1`; renders a top-right Copy button (always) and a top-right Delete button (gated on `onDelete` callback presence); renders a bottom info strip with the "Image X of Y" counter, the "ŌåÉ ŌåÆ to navigate" hint, the "Delete to remove" hint (when canDelete), and the "ESC to close" hint; composes `ConfirmModal` on top when the delete-confirmation gate is open. Keyboard handling: ArrowLeft/ArrowRight navigate, Delete/Backspace open the confirm modal (when canDelete), Cmd/Ctrl+C copies to clipboard, Escape routes through the LayerStack `onEscape` handler. **Default-theme fallback:** when no `theme` prop is supplied, the component constructs a Dracula-mode `Theme` literal inline (verbatim from renderer source) so `ConfirmModal` always has chroma to render against. **Theme access pattern:** keeps the renderer's optional `theme: Theme` prop convention. Parity catalog ships 8 stories total (4 happy + 4 negative ŌĆö meets the brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor) with 6 catalog-shape vitest guards (happy floor, negative-per-happy floor, allowed-verbs, non-empty given/when/then, unique-names, IPC-leakage guard). Happy paths cover dialog chrome + image render with a single staged image, navigation arrow visibility + "Image X of Y" counter with multiple staged images, right-arrow advances counter, and Delete button visibility when `onDelete` is provided. Negative paths cover navigation-arrow suppression with a single staged image, Delete button suppression when `onDelete` is omitted, Escape-via-LayerStack closes the dialog, and Delete key opens the composed ConfirmModal without committing. Uses only the allowed assertion vocabulary; the IPC-leakage guard pins the banned-target list (`window.maestro`, `shell.openpath`, `dialog.`, `tunnel.`, `ipcrenderer`). Renderer-side consumers (`GroupChatInput`, `TerminalOutput` image staging) are NOT touched ŌĆö feature wiring into the webFull tree is a downstream-layer concern. `src/web/` + `src/renderer/` + `src/main/` untouched (additive lift only ŌĆö barrel export added, no patches to upstream files). See Decisions 2026-06-08 ("Layer 2.5 leaf-parade ŌĆö `LightboxModal` lift").
- [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.participant_card: `ParticipantCard` (renderer `src/renderer/components/ParticipantCard.tsx`, 371 LOC, 0 IPC at module load, 0 Electron-only API per pre-flight grep) lifted verbatim into `src/webFull/components/ParticipantCard.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/ParticipantCard.parity.test.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-participant-card` (leaf-parade lift wave). Presentational single-row primitive for a group-chat participant: status dot (pulsing for `busy` / `connecting`, solid otherwise), name, optional SSH-remote pill, session-ID pill (clickable copy-to-clipboard with the first 8 chars uppercased OR `pending` placeholder), message-count + last-activity stats, agent-type label, context-usage gauge with 0-80% accent and Ōēź80% warning colour, optional cost pill, Reset / Remove action buttons (both gated behind their callback prop AND truthy `groupChatId`), and a Peek button toggling an auto-scrolling live-output `<pre>` panel clamped to the trailing 4096 chars. Pre-flight `grep -E "window\.maestro\.|from ['\"]electron['\"]|shell\.openExternal|shell\.openPath|ipcRenderer" src/renderer/components/ParticipantCard.tsx` ŌåÆ empty (exit 1). **Import-path adapts (six, matching the L2.5 cross-fork precedent set by `GroupChatMessages` / `MarkdownRenderer` / `ShortcutsHelpModal` / `CollapsibleJsonViewer`):** `Theme` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/theme-types'`; `GroupChatParticipant` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/group-chat-types'`; `SessionState` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/types'` (renderer-types transitive import ŌĆö matches the `GroupChatHeader` / `GroupChatPanel` / `ShortcutsHelpModal` pattern of importing renderer types directly when the type does not yet have a shared home); `getStatusColor` from `'../utils/theme'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/utils/theme'` (pure renderer helper ŌĆö same cross-fork transitive-import shape used by `GroupChatMessages` for `stripMarkdown` / `generateTerminalProseStyles` and by `CollapsibleJsonViewer` for `safeClipboardWrite`); `formatCost` from `'../utils/formatters'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/formatters'` (bypasses the renderer re-export shim and goes direct to source, matching the `mobile/SessionStatusBanner` precedent); `safeClipboardWrite` from `'../utils/clipboard'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/utils/clipboard'` (browser-API only ŌĆö `navigator.clipboard.writeText` ŌĆö same shape used by `GroupChatMessages`, `CollapsibleJsonViewer`, `AgentErrorModal`). **Composition shape:** no `Modal` / `ModalFooter` / layer-stack registration ŌĆö this is an inline card, NOT a modal. `lucide-react` icons (`MessageSquare`, `Copy`, `Check`, `DollarSign`, `RotateCcw`, `Server`, `UserMinus`, `Eye`, `EyeOff`) kept verbatim ŌĆö already a webFull-tree dep. **Theme access pattern:** kept the renderer's `theme: Theme` prop convention, matching every L2.x lift. **Distinguishing features (preserved verbatim):** the Peek panel auto-scrolls to the bottom on every `liveOutput` mutation while open (driven by a `useEffect` keyed on `[peekOpen, liveOutput]`); the session-ID pill takes the first 8 chars of `agentSessionId` and uppercases them; the cost pill consumes `formatCost(participant.totalCost)` and slices off the leading currency symbol (`.slice(1)`); the Remove action is a two-step confirm flow (Confirm / Cancel buttons) followed by a transient `Removing...` pulse; the context gauge flips from accent to warning at `> 80%`; the status-dot tooltip surfaces an uppercase `getStatusLabel()` mapping (`Working` / `Error` / `Connecting` / `Idle`). **Parity catalog (`src/webFull/components/ParticipantCard.parity.test.ts`, 11 stories: 5 happy + 6 negative ŌĆö exceeds the brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor; 6 catalog-shape vitest guards):** happy-path stories cover name + idle-status rendering, session-ID pill with first-8-chars uppercase + copy-to-clipboard tooltip, SSH-remote pill rendering with the uppercase remote-name copy, context gauge with "Context" label and percent readout, and cost pill rendering when `totalCost > 0`. Negative-path stories cover the `pending` placeholder when `agentSessionId` is undefined (and assert the copy-button variant is absent), SSH-pill suppression when `sshRemoteName` is unset, cost-pill suppression when `totalCost === 0` (renderer source gates on `> 0`), Reset + Remove button suppression when `groupChatId` is undefined (both action buttons gate behind a truthy `groupChatId`), status-dot pulse for the `busy` state (asserts `animate-pulse` class + `title="Working"`), and the peek-panel fallback copy `(no live output yet)` when `liveOutput` is undefined and peek is open. Catalog uses only the allowed assertion vocabulary (`hasElement`, `hasText`, `wsFrameMatches`, `dbHasRow`, `fsHas`, `processHas`, `notificationFired`, `broadcast`) and passes the IPC-leakage guard, the unique-name guard, the negative-per-happy floor guard, and the no-empty-given/when/then guard. **Renderer-side consumers UNTOUCHED:** the renderer's `GroupChatHeader` (or wherever the renderer mounts the participant grid) continues to render the renderer module; feature wiring into the webFull tree is a downstream-layer concern. **Files added (all under `src/webFull/`):** `src/webFull/components/ParticipantCard.tsx` (verbatim lift of the 371-LOC source plus extended header documenting the six import-path adapts and the cross-fork-precedent rationale); `src/webFull/components/ParticipantCard.parity.test.ts` (~240 LOC, 11 stories + 6 catalog-shape guards). **Files modified (additive only):** `src/webFull/components/index.ts` ŌĆö appended `export { ParticipantCard } from './ParticipantCard';` at end-of-file under the existing "Layer 2.5 leaf-parade primitives" section. Barrel collisions resolved mechanically by the `merge=union` driver landed in commit `e3540a054`. **Files NOT touched:** `src/web/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/renderer/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/main/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/server/` (zero bytes diff vs main). See Decisions 2026-06-08 ("Layer 2.5 leaf-parade ŌĆö `ParticipantCard` lift").
- [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.summarize_progress_overlay: `SummarizeProgressOverlay` (renderer `src/renderer/components/SummarizeProgressOverlay.tsx`, 325 LOC, 0 IPC, 0 Electron-only API per pre-flight grep `grep -E "window\.maestro\.|from ['\"]electron['\"]|shell\.openExternal|shell\.openPath|ipcRenderer" src/renderer/components/SummarizeProgressOverlay.tsx` ŌåÆ empty exit 1) lifted verbatim into `src/webFull/components/SummarizeProgressOverlay.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/SummarizeProgressOverlay.parity.test.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-summarize-and-autorun-lightbox` (paired leaf-parade lift). Direct sibling of `MergeProgressOverlay` ŌĆö same inline non-blocking progress-card shape (replaces the input area for a single AI tab during context SUMMARIZATION rather than merging), different stage vocabulary (`extracting` ŌåÆ `summarizing` ŌåÆ `creating` ŌåÆ `complete`), different cancel-confirmation copy (`Cancel Compaction?` / `No` / `Yes` vs Merge's `Cancel Merge?` / `Continue` / `Cancel`), different completion-stats line (`Reduced context by N% (~M ŌåÆ ~K tokens)` with `toLocaleString` formatting vs Merge's `Saved ~N tokens through deduplication`), different head icon (`Wand2` vs `GitMerge`). All side effects flow through the `onCancel` prop; internal state is `showCancelConfirm: boolean` plus a `setInterval`-driven elapsed-time tick inside the nested `ElapsedTimeDisplay` memo. **Two import-path adapts matching the L2.5 / `MergeProgressOverlay` precedent:** (1) `Theme` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/theme-types'`; (2) `SummarizeProgress` and `SummarizeResult` from `'../types/contextMerge'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/types/contextMerge'` (cross-fork type-only import ŌĆö matches the sibling `MergeProgressOverlay` precedent of pulling renderer types directly rather than copying the type module into the webFull tree). The lifted module reads only five fields off `SummarizeResult` (`success`, `error`, `originalTokens`, `compactedTokens`, `reductionPercent`) and the discriminated-union `stage` plus `progress` off `SummarizeProgress`. **Composition shape:** no `Modal` / `ModalFooter` / layer-stack registration ŌĆö inline replacement for the input area, NOT a modal overlay; the cancel-confirmation it gates is a bare `absolute inset-0` overlay scoped to the card (verbatim from renderer source). `lucide-react` icons (`X`, `Check`, `Loader2`, `AlertTriangle`, `Wand2`) kept verbatim. **Theme access pattern:** kept the renderer's `theme: Theme` prop convention. Parity catalog ships 11 stories total (5 happy + 6 negative ŌĆö meets the brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor) plus 6 catalog-shape vitest guards. Happy paths cover the active-state title (`Summarizing Context...`), the completion title (`Context Compacted`) with all four stage labels rendered verbatim (`Extract context`, `Summarize with AI`, `Create new tab`, `Complete`), the completion stats line with `toLocaleString`-formatted token counts (`Reduced context by 95%`, `24,680`, `1,234`), the inline cancel-confirmation card surfacing the canonical `Cancel Compaction?` / `No` / `Yes` copy after the first cancel-button click, and the progress-bar surface during in-flight progress. Negative paths cover suppression of the cancel affordance once complete, the failure title (`Summarization Failed`) + verbatim error message body on `result.success === false`, suppression of the completion stats line on the error branch (a future refactor breaking the `isComplete && result.success` gate would silently emit zero-reduction copy alongside a failure title), suppression of the elapsed-time chip in the completion state, suppression of the inline confirmation before the first cancel-button click, and the no-IPC / no-WS lifecycle pin. 6 catalog-shape vitest guards including a presentational-contract pin that asserts the catalog never drifts toward `role="dialog"` positive targets on the overlay root (the overlay is inline chrome, NOT a modal). 0 IPC namespaces touched; 0 `src/main/` touches; 0 `src/web/` touches; 0 `src/renderer/` edits; 0 `src/server/` edits. Renderer-side consumers (the renderer summarize-and-continue wiring around `MainPanel` / `useContextSummarize`) are NOT touched ŌĆö feature wiring into the webFull tree is a downstream-layer concern that depends on the context-summarize service surface, which lives behind `window.maestro.contextSummarize.*` IPC and has not been ported. See Decisions 2026-06-08 ("Layer 2.5 leaf-parade ŌĆö paired `SummarizeProgressOverlay` + `AutoRunLightbox` lift").
- [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.autorun_lightbox: `AutoRunLightbox` (renderer `src/renderer/components/AutoRunLightbox.tsx`, 338 LOC, 0 module-load IPC, 0 Electron-only module-load API per pre-flight grep `grep -E "window\.maestro\.|from ['\"]electron['\"]|shell\.openExternal|shell\.openPath|ipcRenderer" src/renderer/components/AutoRunLightbox.tsx` ŌåÆ empty exit 1) lifted verbatim into `src/webFull/components/AutoRunLightbox.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/AutoRunLightbox.parity.test.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-summarize-and-autorun-lightbox` (paired leaf-parade lift). Direct sibling of the L2.5 `LightboxModal` lift ŌĆö same full-screen image-viewer shape (carousel navigation, copy-to-clipboard, optional delete) but tuned for the Director's Notes Auto Run flow: the carousel walks an `attachmentsList: string[]` of relative attachment paths, the displayed image source is resolved through an `attachmentPreviews: Map<string, string>` of data-URLs, and an optional `lightboxExternalUrl` allows the viewer to surface non-attachment images (http/https/data) without navigation arrows or delete affordance. Distinguishing features vs `LightboxModal`: portaled into `document.body` via `createPortal` (vs `LightboxModal`'s inline `absolute inset-0`), z-index `9999` (vs LightboxModal's `100`), an extra Copy Markdown button (`![alt](path)` reference with the URL-encoded path + filename-derived alt) that uses the webFull-native `safeClipboardWrite`, an explicit Close button (vs LightboxModal's reliance on click-outside + Escape), filename surfaced in the bottom info strip, and the external-URL branch that suppresses BOTH navigation arrows AND the delete button regardless of `attachmentsList.length`. The component registers with the LayerStack at `MODAL_PRIORITIES.AUTORUN_LIGHTBOX` so Escape-handling cascades correctly with parent overlays. **Import-path adapts (six, matching the L2.5 / `LightboxModal` precedent):** `Theme` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/theme-types'`; `formatShortcutKeys` from `'../utils/shortcutFormatter'` ŌåÆ `'../utils/shortcutFormatter'` (resolves to webFull-side mirror at `src/webFull/utils/shortcutFormatter.ts`); `useLayerStack` from `'../contexts/LayerStackContext'` ŌåÆ `'../contexts/LayerStackContext'` (resolves to webFull L2.1 LayerStack lift); `MODAL_PRIORITIES` from `'../constants/modalPriorities'` ŌåÆ `'../constants/modalPriorities'` (webFull re-export shim ŌĆö non-divergent constants stay re-exported per Architect 2026-06-08 audit risk A); `ConfirmModal` from `'./ConfirmModal'` ŌåÆ `'./ConfirmModal'` (webFull L2.1 primitive); `safeClipboardWrite` from `'../utils/clipboard'` ŌåÆ `'../utils/clipboard'` (webFull-side pure-surface lift ŌĆö `navigator.clipboard.writeText` only); `safeClipboardWriteImage` from `'../utils/clipboard'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/utils/clipboard'` (intentionally NOT lifted into webFull because it reaches `window.maestro.shell.copyImageToClipboard`, the Electron preload bridge ŌĆö the webFull `clipboard.ts` header documents this explicitly; cross-fork re-import precedent set by the sibling `LightboxModal` lift). **Runtime-only Electron branch documented but out-of-scope for the parity contract:** `safeClipboardWriteImage` internally optional-chains `window.maestro?.shell?.copyImageToClipboard`; on webFull `window.maestro` is undefined and the implementation falls through to the browser `navigator.clipboard.write()` path via `fetch(dataUrl) ŌåÆ blob() ŌåÆ ClipboardItem`. That branch is library-internal to `clipboard.ts` and is NOT part of `AutoRunLightbox`'s observable contract ŌĆö the parity catalog asserts only the copy-button UX (icon swap + "Copied!" confirmation), not the underlying transport. **Composition shape:** mounts a portal into `document.body` containing a full-bleed `<div className="fixed inset-0 z-[9999] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/90">` overlay; renders the expanded image centred; renders left/right arrow buttons when `canNavigate` (`attachmentsList.length > 1 && !lightboxExternalUrl`); renders a top-right Copy Markdown button (always), Copy Image button (always), Delete button (gated on `onDelete` AND absence of `lightboxExternalUrl`), and Close button; renders a bottom info strip with the filename, the "Image X of Y" counter (only when canNavigate), the "Delete to remove" hint (when canDelete + no external URL), and the "ESC to close" hint; composes the L2.1 `ConfirmModal` on top when the delete-confirmation gate is open. Keyboard handling: ArrowLeft/ArrowRight navigate, Delete/Backspace open the confirm modal (when canDelete + no external URL), Cmd/Ctrl+C copies the image to clipboard, Escape routes through the LayerStack `onEscape` handler. **Theme access pattern:** kept the renderer's `theme: Theme` prop convention. Parity catalog ships 11 stories total (5 happy + 6 negative ŌĆö meets the brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor) plus 6 catalog-shape vitest guards (happy floor, negative-per-happy floor, allowed-verbs, non-empty given/when/then, unique-names, IPC-leakage guard). Happy paths cover image + close button rendering with a single attachment, navigation arrows + counter + filename surfacing with multiple attachments, copy-image + copy-markdown button presence (always), delete button visibility when `onDelete` is supplied with no external URL, and the external-URL branch rendering image + close + ESC hint without nav/delete. Negative paths cover navigation-arrow suppression with a single attachment, navigation suppression on the external-URL branch even with siblings present, Delete button suppression when `onDelete` is omitted, Delete button suppression on the external-URL branch even when `onDelete` is supplied, the early-return-null branch when `attachmentPreviews` cannot resolve the filename (no image and no close button rendered), and the no-module-load-IPC lifecycle pin. Uses only the allowed assertion vocabulary; the IPC-leakage guard pins the banned-target list (`window.maestro`, `shell.openpath`, `dialog.`, `tunnel.`, `ipcrenderer`, `shell.openexternal`). Renderer-side consumers (`DirectorNotes` / `AutoRunDashboard` image wiring) are NOT touched ŌĆö feature wiring into the webFull tree is a downstream-layer concern. `src/web/` + `src/renderer/` + `src/main/` + `src/server/` untouched (additive lift only ŌĆö barrel exports added, no patches to upstream files). See Decisions 2026-06-08 ("Layer 2.5 leaf-parade ŌĆö paired `SummarizeProgressOverlay` + `AutoRunLightbox` lift").
- [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.groupchat*input: `GroupChatInput` (renderer `src/renderer/components/GroupChatInput.tsx`, 662 LOC, 0 IPC at module load, 0 Electron-only API per pre-flight grep) lifted verbatim into `src/webFull/components/GroupChatInput.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/GroupChatInput.parity.test.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-groupchat-input` (leaf-parade lift wave).
