The component is composable at module-load time; the ONLY non-React / non-prop renderer architecture it self-sources at module load is the `useSettingsStore` hook for `spellCheck` (line 117 in the renderer), neutralized here per the strip-and-promote-to-prop pattern established by `AppOverlays` and `SessionList`. **Import-path adapts (six, matching the L2.5 precedent set by `GroupChatPanel` / `GroupChatHeader`):** `Theme` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/theme-types'` (standard L2.5 swap); `GroupChatParticipant` + `GroupChatState` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/group-chat-types'` (canonical source); `Group` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/types'` (canonical source); `Session` + `QueuedItem` + `Shortcut` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/types'` (cross-fork pure data-shape imports, matching the `GroupChatHeader` / `GroupChatPanel` / `ShortcutsHelpModal` precedent; the renderer types barrel is IPC-clean per pre-flight grep); `shortcutFormatter` helpers (`formatShortcutKeys`, `formatEnterToSend`, `formatEnterToSendTooltip`) ŌåÆ `'../utils/shortcutFormatter'` (the webFull shim ŌĆö fourth consumer after `AutoRunnerHelpModal`, `GroupChatMessages`, `GroupChatHeader`); `QueuedItemsList` ŌåÆ `'./QueuedItemsList'` (precondition #1 ŌĆö same relative path as renderer, different tree); `normalizeMentionName` ŌåÆ `'../utils/participantColors'` (precondition #2 ŌĆö same relative path as renderer, different tree). **Settings-store adapt (strip-and-promote-to-prop):** the renderer source's line 117 reads `useSettingsStore((s) => s.spellCheck)`; the hook call is stripped and `spellCheck?: boolean` is promoted onto the prop surface, defaulting to `true` (matches the renderer store's initial state in `SettingsState`). Host wiring is downstream; until a webFull settings adapter lands (likely WS-backed, matching the pattern flagged for `loadColorPreferences` in the `participantColors` lift), callers that want non-default spell-check behavior pass the prop explicitly. Precedent: `AppOverlays` strips three `useSettingsStore` / `useModalStore` hooks and promotes the three values onto its prop surface; `SessionList` strips a similar set. **Cross-fork edges accepted as transitive surface:** three (the renderer types barrel imports for `Session`, `QueuedItem`, `Shortcut`). Same posture as `GroupChatHeader` and `GroupChatPanel`. All three are pure data shapes; the edges collapse to zero when those interfaces are replicated to `src/shared/` (a future downstream cleanup). **GroupChatPanel cross-fork drain ŌĆö to ZERO:** this lift's commit also retargets `src/webFull/components/GroupChatPanel.tsx` line 84 from `'../../renderer/components/GroupChatInput'` ŌåÆ `'./GroupChatInput'`. The `GroupChatPanel` cross-fork \_component* edge is now neutralized (the only remaining cross-fork edges on `GroupChatPanel` are the same three pure data-shape type imports `Session` / `QueuedItem` / `Shortcut`, matching `GroupChatInput` itself). `GroupChatPanel.parity.test.ts` regression check passes 7/7 after the retarget ŌĆö no behavioral drift. **Composition shape:** outer `div.relative.p-4.border-t` wrapper; `QueuedItemsList` rendered above the textarea when `executionQueue.length > 0`; `@mention` dropdown (groups expanding into member-mention runs, terminal sessions excluded); staged-image strip with click-to-lightbox + hover-revealed remove button; textarea with auto-resize bound to `scrollHeight` capped at 176px; bottom toolbar (prompt-composer when wired, attach-image always present, hidden file input, Read-Only pill, Enter-to-send toggle); Send button gated on `message.trim()` non-empty (queues when `state !== 'idle'`, colour-coded `warning` vs `accent`). **Theme access pattern:** kept the renderer's `theme: Theme` prop convention, matching every L2.x lift. **Parity catalog (`src/webFull/components/GroupChatInput.parity.test.ts`, 10 stories: 5 happy + 5 negative ŌĆö meets brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor; 7 catalog-shape vitest guards):** happy-path stories cover textarea presence + idle placeholder copy (`"Type a message... (@ to mention agent)"`), busy placeholder swap (`"Type to queue message..."`), Send button title-swap (idle = `"Send message"`, busy = `"Queue message"`), Read-Only pill literal copy, and `QueuedItemsList` sibling composition through the canonical `"QUEUED (3)"` copy when queue is wired. Negative-path stories cover queue-suppression-when-empty, prompt-composer-suppression-when-not-wired, mention-dropdown-not-rendered-on-mount, no-modal-shape (the input region is inline chrome, NOT `[role="dialog"]`), and a no-IPC / no-WS lifecycle pin. Catalog uses only the allowed assertion vocabulary; the render-shape-vocabulary guard pins happy-path stories to `hasElement` / `hasText` only (click semantics belong to feature-consumer catalogs); the IPC-leakage guard pins the banned-target list. **Renderer-side consumers UNTOUCHED:** the renderer `MainPanel` / `App.tsx` that mounts the renderer `GroupChatInput` continues to render the renderer module; feature wiring into the webFull tree is a downstream-layer concern. **Files added (all under `src/webFull/`):** `src/webFull/components/GroupChatInput.tsx` (verbatim lift of the 662-LOC source plus extended header documenting the six import-path adapts, the strip-and-promote-to-prop adapt for `spellCheck`, and the cross-fork-precedent rationale); `src/webFull/components/GroupChatInput.parity.test.ts` (~210 LOC, 10 stories + 7 catalog-shape guards). **Files modified (additive only):** `src/webFull/components/index.ts` ŌĆö appended `export { GroupChatInput } from './GroupChatInput';` at end-of-file under the existing "Layer 2.5 leaf-parade primitives" section. **Files modified (cross-fork drain):** `src/webFull/components/GroupChatPanel.tsx` ŌĆö one-line import-string flip from `'../../renderer/components/GroupChatInput'` ŌåÆ `'./GroupChatInput'`. Permitted by brief ("Modifying src/webFull/components/GroupChatPanel.tsx is permitted (the retarget is in scope)"). **Files NOT touched:** `src/web/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/renderer/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/main/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/server/` (zero bytes diff vs main). **Verification:** `npm run lint` clean for `src/webFull/` (zero new errors vs baseline ŌĆö lint baseline on `main` carries 1595 lines of pre-existing renderer/web errors unrelated to this lift; `npm run lint 2>&1 | grep -i "webFull/components/GroupChatInput\|webFull/components/GroupChatPanel\|webFull/components/index"` ŌåÆ empty); `npx vitest run src/webFull/components/GroupChatInput.parity.test.ts` ŌåÆ 7/7 catalog-shape tests passed; `npx vitest run src/webFull/components/GroupChatPanel.parity.test.ts` ŌåÆ 7/7 regression check still passing after the cross-fork drain. **Not pushed per brief instruction** ŌĆö branch sits locally at `leaf-groupchat-input`, awaiting Trillium's merge.
- [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.session_activity_graph: `SessionActivityGraph` (renderer `src/renderer/components/SessionActivityGraph.tsx`, 365 LOC, 0 IPC, 0 Electron-only API per pre-flight grep `grep -n "window\.maestro\|window\.electronAPI\|require(" src/renderer/components/SessionActivityGraph.tsx` ŌåÆ empty) lifted verbatim into `src/webFull/components/SessionActivityGraph.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/SessionActivityGraph.parity.test.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-session-activity-graph` (leaf-parade lift wave). Presentational histogram of `ActivityEntry` items (anything carrying a `timestamp: string | number`) bucketed across a configurable lookback window. Right-click opens a context menu of lookback options (`24 hours` ŌĆ” `All time`); left-click on a non-empty bar fires `onBarClick(bucketStart, bucketEnd)` so the caller can drill into a filtered range; hover surfaces a tooltip with bucket range label + count. Used by History views to scrub activity over time. All side effects flow through the `onBarClick` and `onLookbackChange` props ŌĆö the component touches 0 IPC namespaces / 0 Electron-only APIs. **Import-path adapts (two, matching the L2.5 cross-fork precedent set by `AgentPromptComposerModal` for pure presentation hooks):** (1) `Theme` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/theme-types'` (standard L2.5 swap ŌĆö renderer aggregator at `src/renderer/types/index.ts` re-exports from canonical shared source); (2) `useContextMenuPosition` from `'../hooks/ui/useContextMenuPosition'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/hooks/ui/useContextMenuPosition'` (pure renderer hook: `useLayoutEffect` + `useState` + `window` bounding-rect math only; no `window.maestro`, no Electron-only API, no `from 'electron'` ŌĆö pulling direct from renderer follows the `useTemplateAutocomplete` / `useClickOutside` precedent rather than duplicating into webFull and creating the silent-drift surface audit risk A explicitly warns against). **Composition shape:** no `Modal` / `ModalFooter` / layer-stack registration ŌĆö this is an inline histogram, NOT a modal. The right-click context menu is a bare `fixed z-50` positioned-via-hook panel (verbatim from renderer source) that closes itself on the next document click. `lucide-react` icon (`Check`) kept verbatim ŌĆö already a webFull-tree dep. **Theme access pattern:** kept the renderer's `theme: Theme` prop convention, matching every L2.x lift. **Parity catalog (`src/webFull/components/SessionActivityGraph.parity.test.ts`, 10 stories: 5 happy + 5 negative ŌĆö meets the brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor; 7 catalog-shape vitest guards):** happy-path stories cover the host-element summary tooltip rendering with `<label>: <N> sessions (right-click to change)` copy, the right-click context menu surfacing every `LOOKBACK_OPTIONS` label, the active-option checkmark icon (`svg.lucide-check`), the one-week-lookback axis labels (`Xd` + `Now`), and the 24-hour-lookback axis labels (`Xh` + `0h`). Negative-path stories cover the singular `session` (no trailing `s`) form when count is exactly 1, the zero-session tooltip when entries are empty, context-menu suppression before any right-click, the no-IPC / no-WS lifecycle pin across mount + hover + click + right-click + lookback-change, and rendering without the optional `onBarClick` prop. Catalog uses only the allowed assertion vocabulary (`hasElement`, `hasText`, `wsFrameMatches`, `dbHasRow`, `fsHas`, `processHas`, `notificationFired`, `broadcast`); 7/7 catalog-shape vitest guards pass including a presentational-contract pin that asserts the catalog never drifts toward `role="dialog"` positive targets on the histogram root (a future refactor wrapping the graph in a modal is a behavior change and should fail the catalog rather than silently track it). 0 IPC namespaces touched; 0 `src/main/` touches; 0 `src/web/` touches; 0 `src/renderer/` edits; 0 `src/server/` edits ŌĆö confirmed via `git diff main..HEAD -- src/web/ src/renderer/ src/main/ | wc -c` ŌåÆ 0. **Files added (all under `src/webFull/`):** `src/webFull/components/SessionActivityGraph.tsx` (verbatim lift of the 365-LOC source plus extended header documenting the two import-path adapts and the cross-fork-precedent rationale); `src/webFull/components/SessionActivityGraph.parity.test.ts` (10 stories + 7 catalog-shape guards). **Files modified (additive only):** `src/webFull/components/index.ts` ŌĆö appended `export { SessionActivityGraph, LOOKBACK_OPTIONS } from './SessionActivityGraph';` + `export type { LookbackPeriod, ActivityEntry } from './SessionActivityGraph';` under the existing "Layer 2.5 leaf-parade primitives" section. **Renderer-side consumers UNTOUCHED:** the renderer's `SessionHistory` / `HistoryView` (or wherever the renderer mounts the activity graph) continues to render the renderer module; feature wiring into the webFull tree is a downstream-layer concern. `npm run lint` clean (after `npm run build:prompts` to materialize the pre-existing `src/generated/prompts.ts`); parity-suite 7/7 in-suite assertions pass. See Decisions 2026-06-08 ("Layer 2.5 leaf-parade ŌĆö `SessionActivityGraph` lift").
- [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.merge_progress_overlay: `MergeProgressOverlay` (renderer `src/renderer/components/MergeProgressOverlay.tsx`, 339 LOC, 0 IPC, 0 Electron-only API per pre-flight grep) lifted verbatim into `src/webFull/components/MergeProgressOverlay.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/MergeProgressOverlay.parity.test.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-merge-progress-overlay` (leaf-parade lift wave). Inline, non-blocking progress card that replaces the input area for a single AI tab while a context merge is in flight; unlike the modal-shape merge surface this is per-tab, so other tabs stay interactive while the merge runs in the background. Pre-flight `grep -E "window\.maestro\.|from ['\"]electron['\"]|shell\.openExternal|shell\.openPath|ipcRenderer" src/renderer/components/MergeProgressOverlay.tsx` ŌåÆ empty (exit 1). The component is purely presentational ŌĆö all side effects flow through the `onCancel` prop callback; internal state is `showCancelConfirm: boolean` plus a `setInterval`-driven elapsed-time tick inside the nested `ElapsedTimeDisplay` memo. Two import-path adapts matching the L2.5 precedent: (1) `Theme` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/theme-types'` (standard L2.5 swap; renderer aggregator routes through `src/renderer/types/index.ts` which re-exports the canonical type from `src/shared/theme-types`), and (2) `GroomingProgress` and `MergeResult` from `'../types/contextMerge'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/types/contextMerge'` (cross-fork type-only import, matching the `GroupChatHeader` / `ShortcutsHelpModal` precedent of pulling renderer types directly rather than copying the type module into the webFull tree ŌĆö duplicating it would create the silent-drift surface audit risk A explicitly warns against; the renderer aggregator stays canonical until a future port consolidates the context-merge type surface into `src/shared/`). The lifted module reads only three primitive fields off `MergeResult` (`success`, `error`, `tokensSaved`) and the discriminated-union `stage` plus `progress` off `GroomingProgress`. **Composition shape:** no `Modal` / `ModalFooter` / layer-stack registration ŌĆö this is an inline replacement for the input area, NOT a modal overlay. The cancel-confirmation it gates is a bare `absolute inset-0` overlay scoped to the card (verbatim from the renderer source). `lucide-react` icons (`X`, `Check`, `Loader2`, `AlertTriangle`, `GitMerge`) kept verbatim ŌĆö already a webFull-tree dep used by sibling L2.5 lifts. **Theme access pattern:** kept the renderer's `theme: Theme` prop convention, consistent with every L2.x lift. Parity catalog ships 11 stories total (5 happy + 6 negative ŌĆö meets the brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor): happy paths cover the active-state title interpolation with source + target names, the completion title + all four stage labels rendering verbatim ("Collect contexts", "Groom with AI", "Add to session", "Complete"), the completion stats line with the `toLocaleString`-formatted token count and the canonical "Saved ~<N> tokens through deduplication" copy, the inline cancel-confirmation card surfacing after the first cancel-button click ("Cancel Merge?", "Continue", "Cancel"), and the fallback active-state title ("Merging Contexts...") when source/target names are omitted; negative paths cover suppression of the cancel affordance once complete, the failure title + error message body on `result.success === false`, suppression of the completion stats line when `tokensSaved === 0` (a future refactor flipping the `> 0` gate to `>= 0` would silently emit "Saved ~0 tokens" copy), suppression of the elapsed-time chip in the completion state (a future refactor breaking the `!isComplete && !hasError` gate would silently leave the chip ticking forever), suppression of the inline confirmation before the first cancel-button click, and the no-IPC / no-WS lifecycle pin. 6 catalog-shape vitest guards pass (6/6) including a presentational-contract pin that asserts the catalog never drifts toward `role="dialog"` positive targets on the overlay root (the overlay is inline chrome above the input area, NOT a modal ŌĆö a future refactor wrapping it in a modal is a behavior change and should fail the catalog rather than silently track it). 0 IPC namespaces touched; 0 `src/main/` touches; 0 `src/web/` touches; 0 `src/renderer/` edits; 0 `src/server/` edits. Renderer-side consumers (`MainPanel` / `TerminalOutput` wiring around the renderer overlay) are NOT touched ŌĆö feature wiring into the webFull tree is a downstream-layer concern that depends on the context-grooming service surface, which lives behind `window.maestro.contextMerge.*` IPC and has not been ported. See Decisions 2026-06-08 ("Layer 2.5 leaf-parade ŌĆö `MergeProgressOverlay` lift").
- [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.git_diff_viewer: `GitDiffViewer` (renderer `src/renderer/components/GitDiffViewer.tsx`, 326 LOC, 0 IPC at module-load AND runtime per pre-flight grep) lifted verbatim into `src/webFull/components/GitDiffViewer.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/GitDiffViewer.parity.test.ts` and companion util lift at `src/webFull/utils/gitDiffParser.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-git-diff-viewer` (leaf-parade lift wave). Modal dialog that renders a parsed git diff as a tabbed file viewer ŌĆö one tab per changed file with per-file `+`/`-` counts in the strip; the active tab body renders text diffs via `react-diff-view` `<Diff>` + `<Hunk>`, `ImageDiffViewer` side-by-side for image entries, "Binary file changed" copy for non-image binaries, and an "Unable to parse diff for this file" fallback when a non-binary entry's `parsedDiff.length === 0`. Header row carries the "Git Diff" title, the `cwd` badge, the "N files changed" copy (pluralised), and a Close (Esc) affordance; footer surfaces "Current file:" + per-file stat counts + "File N of M". Layer registration via `useLayerStack` at `MODAL_PRIORITIES.GIT_DIFF` (priority 200) with `focusTrap: 'lenient'`, `blocksLowerLayers: true`, `capturesFocus: true`, `ariaLabel: 'Git Diff Preview'`, and Escape-to-close wired through an `onCloseRef` ref to avoid re-registering the layer on every parent re-render. Keyboard navigation: Cmd/Ctrl+`[` and Cmd/Ctrl+`]` cycle through tabs (wraps). Pre-flight `grep -E "window\.maestro\.|from ['\"]electron['\"]|ipcRenderer|shell\.openExternal|shell\.openPath" src/renderer/components/GitDiffViewer.tsx` ŌåÆ empty (exit 1) for both module-load AND runtime ŌĆö the viewer itself touches zero IPC namespaces and zero Electron-only APIs; all side effects flow through the `onClose` prop callback. **Import-path adapts (six, with one explicit cross-fork edge documented inline):** (1) `Theme` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/theme-types'` (standard L2.5 swap; renderer aggregator routes through `src/renderer/types/index.ts` which re-exports the canonical type from `src/shared/theme-types`); (2) `parseGitDiff`, `getFileName`, `getDiffStats` from `'../utils/gitDiffParser'` ŌåÆ `'../utils/gitDiffParser'` (companion lift ŌĆö the pure 112-LOC util is lifted verbatim alongside this viewer at `src/webFull/utils/gitDiffParser.ts` to avoid a cross-fork edge for the parser, which is a leaf-of-the-leaf and consumed nowhere else in webFull today; `react-diff-view` resolves identically from both fork-roots and stays unchanged); (3) `useLayerStack` from `'../contexts/LayerStackContext'` ŌåÆ `'../contexts/LayerStackContext'` (already a webFull-tree context from the L2.1 layer-stack port ŌĆö no path shift needed); (4) `MODAL_PRIORITIES` from `'../constants/modalPriorities'` ŌåÆ `'../constants/modalPriorities'` (the webFull module is a re-export-only shim from `src/renderer/constants/modalPriorities.ts` per the established Architect audit-A precedent ŌĆö constants don't diverge across fork-roots); (5) **CROSS-FORK EDGE ŌĆö `ImageDiffViewer` from `'./ImageDiffViewer'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/components/ImageDiffViewer'`**. The image-diff sub-view self-sources image bytes via `window.maestro.git.showFile()` and `window.maestro.fs.readFile()` inside a `useEffect` ŌĆö runtime IPC, NOT module-load. Lifting `ImageDiffViewer` into webFull would drag two IPC namespaces (`git`, `fs`) through the webFull surface, which is out of scope for this leaf and blocked on the server-side `/api/git/show-file` + `/api/fs/read-file` REST routes that have not been ported. The viewer ONLY mounts `ImageDiffViewer` when `activeFile.isImage === true`, so for the 80%-text-diff use case the edge is dormant; a future follow-on (tracked at ISC-44.layer-2.5.image_diff_viewer below) drops the edge when the routes land. This matches the established cross-fork-edge precedent set by `GroupChatPanel`'s edge to `'../../renderer/components/GroupChatInput'` before the `QueuedItemsList` blocker landed; (6) **CROSS-FORK EDGE ŌĆö `generateDiffViewStyles` from `'../utils/markdownConfig'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/utils/markdownConfig'`**. The styles generator is a pure CSS-string emitter (verified clean at module-load via head inspection: only `react-markdown`, `react-syntax-highlighter`, type imports, and intra-renderer pure helpers ŌĆö no `window.maestro` reach at the top level; the two `window.maestro.shell.openExternal` calls at lines 696 + 796 are inside click handlers, NOT module-load). Lifting the full ~900-LOC `markdownConfig` surface is its own leaf out of scope for this port ŌĆö the styles generator is consumed by `AutoRun.tsx`, `TerminalOutput.tsx`, `GroupChatMessages.tsx`, `GitDiffViewer.tsx`, `GitLogViewer.tsx` and is the natural seed of a future shared-prose-style port. The cross-fork edge here matches the established `markdownConfig` reuse pattern flagged by audit risk A. **Composition shape:** modal-overlay (`fixed inset-0 z-[9999]`), distinct from the inline `MergeProgressOverlay` chrome that ships in the same wave ŌĆö this is a true modal with `role="dialog"` + `aria-modal="true"` + layer-stack registration. The empty-state shell renders the same overlay frame minus the tab strip and content body; the populated shell composes header + tabs + content + footer. `lucide-react` icons (`Plus`, `Minus`, `ImageIcon`) kept verbatim ŌĆö already a webFull-tree dep. **Theme access pattern:** kept the renderer's `theme: Theme` prop convention, consistent with every L2.x lift. **Parity catalog (`src/webFull/components/GitDiffViewer.parity.test.ts`, 10 stories total: 5 happy + 5 negative ŌĆö meets the brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor; 6 vitest catalog-shape guards):** happy-path stories cover the populated-state header copy (title + cwd badge + "N files changed" + Close affordance), the tab strip rendering filenames + per-file insertion counts, the active-tab text-diff file-header arrow ("oldPath ŌåÆ newPath"), the footer "File N of M" + "Current file:" copy, and the non-image binary branch surfacing "Binary file changed" copy + "binary" tab indicator. Negative-path stories cover the empty-state fallback when `diffText` is `""` (asserts "No changes to display" + tab-strip suppression via `body:not(:has(div.scrollbar-thin))`), the empty-state fallback when `diffText` is malformed prose (parser yields 0 sections, no thrown exception), text-diff file-header suppression when the active file is binary (binary-branch short-circuit), the "Unable to parse diff for this file" fallback when a non-binary entry has empty `parsedDiff`, and the no-IPC / no-WS lifecycle pin. Catalog uses only the allowed assertion vocabulary (`hasElement`, `hasText`, `wsFrameMatches`, `dbHasRow`, `fsHas`, `processHas`, `notificationFired`, `broadcast`) and passes the IPC-leakage guard, the negative-per-happy floor guard, the no-empty-given/when/then guard, and the modal-shape presentational-contract pin (keeps the catalog observable-behavior-only without inverting the `role="dialog"` contract). **Files added (all under `src/webFull/`):** `src/webFull/components/GitDiffViewer.tsx` (verbatim lift of the 326-LOC source plus extended header documenting the six import-path adapts and the two cross-fork edges); `src/webFull/components/GitDiffViewer.parity.test.ts` (10 stories + 6 catalog-shape guards); `src/webFull/utils/gitDiffParser.ts` (verbatim lift of the 112-LOC pure util). **Files modified (additive only):** `src/webFull/components/index.ts` ŌĆö appended `export { GitDiffViewer } from './GitDiffViewer';` + `export type { GitDiffViewerProps } from './GitDiffViewer';` at end-of-file. **Files NOT touched:** `src/web/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/renderer/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/main/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/server/` (zero bytes diff vs main). `npm run lint` clean (after `npm run build:prompts` to materialize the pre-existing `src/generated/prompts.ts`). Vitest parity catalog: 6/6 in-suite guards passed (487ms). **Cross-fork edges to retire:** `ISC-44.layer-2.5.image_diff_viewer` (depends on server-side `/api/git/show-file` + `/api/fs/read-file` REST routes) and a future shared-prose-styles consolidation (deferred ŌĆö same edge consumed by `GroupChatMessages`, `TerminalOutput`, `AutoRun`, `GitLogViewer`).
- [ ] ISC-44.layer-2.5.image_diff_viewer: `ImageDiffViewer` (renderer `src/renderer/components/ImageDiffViewer.tsx`, 226 LOC). Currently DEFERRED ŌĆö blocked on server-side `/api/git/show-file` + `/api/fs/read-file` REST routes. The viewer self-sources image bytes via `window.maestro.git.showFile()` + `window.maestro.fs.readFile()` inside a `useEffect` (runtime IPC, not module-load), so lifting it would drag two IPC namespaces (`git`, `fs`) through the webFull surface. `GitDiffViewer` (ISC-44.layer-2.5.git_diff_viewer) currently consumes this via a cross-fork edge (`'../../renderer/components/ImageDiffViewer'`) ŌĆö only mounts when `activeFile.isImage === true`, so dormant for the 80%-text-diff use case. Retire the edge when this lift lands.
- [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.csv_table_renderer: `CsvTableRenderer` (renderer `src/renderer/components/CsvTableRenderer.tsx`, 383 LOC, 0 IPC at module load, 0 Electron-only API per pre-flight grep) lifted verbatim into `src/webFull/components/CsvTableRenderer.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/CsvTableRenderer.parity.test.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-csv-table-renderer` (leaf-parade lift wave). Presentational delimited-content table renderer used by the file-preview surface to render `.csv` / `.tsv` payloads as a sortable, searchable HTML `<table>`. Parses input strings (handles quoted fields + escaped quotes), groups header / data rows, infers per-column alignment from data content (>50% numeric ŌåÆ right-align), filters rows by `searchQuery` (case-insensitive, any-cell match), caps the rendered set at `MAX_DISPLAY_ROWS = 500` with a truncation banner, supports tri-state header-click sort (asc ŌåÆ desc ŌåÆ off), and highlights search matches inside cells with `<mark>` spans. Empty input renders an empty-state placeholder. Pre-flight `grep -nE "window\.maestro\.|window\.electron|ipcRenderer|from ['\"]electron['\"]|shell\.openExternal|shell\.openPath|window\.api|require\(" src/renderer/components/CsvTableRenderer.tsx` ŌåÆ empty (exit 1). The component is purely presentational ŌĆö all side effects flow through caller-owned callbacks (`onMatchCount`); local state is `sort: SortState | null` only. **Import-path adapt (one, matching the L2.5 cross-fork precedent set by `SessionActivityGraph` / `MergeProgressOverlay` / `ThemePicker`):** `Theme` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/theme-types'` (standard L2.5 swap ŌĆö the renderer aggregator at `src/renderer/types/index.ts` re-exports `Theme` from `src/shared/theme-types`, so webFull pulls direct from the canonical source rather than transit the renderer barrel). **Composition shape:** no `Modal` / `ModalFooter` / layer-stack registration ŌĆö this is an inline content view, NOT a modal. The `searchQuery` is consumer-controlled (the file-preview surface owns the search box) and the `onMatchCount` callback lets the parent surface match counts without re-running the filter logic itself. `lucide-react` icons (`ChevronUp`, `ChevronDown`) kept verbatim ŌĆö already a webFull-tree dep used by sibling L2.5 lifts. **Theme access pattern:** kept the renderer's `theme: Theme` prop convention, consistent with every L2.x lift. **Parity catalog (`src/webFull/components/CsvTableRenderer.parity.test.ts`, 10 stories total: 5 happy + 5 negative ŌĆö meets the brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor; 6 catalog-shape vitest guards):** happy paths cover well-formed CSV rendering header + data rows + footer row-count copy, the row-number column prepending 1-indexed numbers, the TSV-delimiter prop parsing tab-separated content into separate columns, the search query wrapping matching substrings in `<mark>` elements (case-insensitive) + filtering non-matching rows, and header-click ascending sort surfacing the chevron-up SVG while preserving the row set. Negative paths cover the empty-content branch rendering "Empty CSV file" copy + suppressing the `<table>` element, search with no matches surfacing the "0 of N rows match" footer + suppressing `<mark>` elements, the quoted-comma-inside-field case preserving the field as one cell (NOT splitting on the embedded comma), the data-only single-line input treating the line as the header row + rendering "0 rows" in the footer, and the no-IPC / no-WS / no-FS / no-process-spawn lifecycle pin (asserts `wsFrameMatches`/`fsHas`/`processHas` are all `<none>` across mount + sort transitions + searchQuery cycling). Catalog uses only the allowed assertion vocabulary (`hasElement`, `hasText`, `wsFrameMatches`, `dbHasRow`, `fsHas`, `processHas`, `notificationFired`, `broadcast`) and stays render-shape oriented (`hasElement` / `hasText` for positive renders, `<none>`-sentinel `wsFrameMatches` / `fsHas` / `processHas` for the IPC-leak lifecycle pin). 6 in-suite vitest guards (Ōēź3 happy floor; Ōēź1 negative-per-happy floor; allowed-verbs-only; non-empty given/when/then; IPC-leak guard against positive `window.maestro` / `shell.openpath` / `dialog.` / `tunnel.` / `ipcrenderer` assertions, skipping `<none>`-sentinel negative-shape assertions; and a unique-story-name guard) ŌĆö all 6 pass (`MAESTRO_HEADLESS=1 vitest run` clean, 509ms). **Renderer-side consumers UNTOUCHED:** the renderer's `FilePreview` continues to import the renderer module; feature wiring into the webFull tree is a downstream-layer concern (the webFull file-preview surface has not been ported). **Files added (all under `src/webFull/`):** `src/webFull/components/CsvTableRenderer.tsx` (verbatim lift of the 383-LOC source plus an extended header documenting the single import-path adapt, the cross-fork-precedent rationale, the zero-IPC contract, and the inline-content (non-modal) composition shape); `src/webFull/components/CsvTableRenderer.parity.test.ts` (~265 LOC, 10 stories + 6 catalog-shape guards). **Files modified (additive only):** `src/webFull/components/index.ts` ŌĆö appended `export { CsvTableRenderer } from './CsvTableRenderer';` + `export type { CsvTableRendererProps } from './CsvTableRenderer';` after the existing `SessionItem` export under the Layer 2.5 leaf-parade section. **Files NOT touched:** `src/web/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/renderer/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/main/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/server/` (zero bytes diff vs main). `npm run lint` clean (after `npm run build:prompts` to materialize the pre-existing `src/generated/prompts.ts`). 0 IPC namespaces touched. See Decisions 2026-06-08 ("Layer 2.5 leaf-parade ŌĆö `CsvTableRenderer` lift").
- [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.mermaid_renderer: `MermaidRenderer` (renderer `src/renderer/components/MermaidRenderer.tsx`, 475 LOC, 0 IPC at module-load AND runtime per pre-flight grep `grep -nE "window\.maestro\.|window\.electron|ipcRenderer|from ['\"]electron['\"]|shell\.openExternal|shell\.openPath" src/renderer/components/MermaidRenderer.tsx` ŌåÆ empty exit 1) lifted verbatim into `src/webFull/components/MermaidRenderer.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/MermaidRenderer.parity.test.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-mermaid-and-groupchat-modal` (leaf-parade lift wave ŌĆö paired branch with `groupchat_modal` STOP). Mermaid-diagram renderer that consumes a chart-source string + `theme: Theme`, validates via `mermaid.parse`, renders to SVG via `mermaid.render`, sanitises through DOMPurify (svg + svgFilters profiles with `foreignObject` re-allowed for HTML labels), and appends the parsed SVG to a `ref`-tracked container via a post-render `useLayoutEffect`. While the render is in flight it surfaces a "Rendering diagram..." chip inside a min-height-60px `.mermaid-container`; on parse / render failure it surfaces a red-bordered error card with a `<details><summary>View source</summary><pre>...</pre></details>` block exposing the chart text for inspection. The mermaid singleton is initialised with `securityLevel: 'strict'` + `suppressErrorRendering: true` + a ~260-LOC theme-variable block that tints every flowchart / sequence / gantt / pie / git-graph / mindmap / quadrant / xy-chart / timeline / sankey / state / ER / requirement / class diagram surface with the app's accent / success / warning / error / border / textMain / textDim colours. The component is purely presentational ŌĆö all side effects flow through the `chart` + `theme` props. **Import-path adapt (one, matching the L2.5 precedent):** `Theme` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/theme-types'` (standard L2.5 swap ŌĆö renderer aggregator at `src/renderer/types/index.ts` re-exports from canonical shared source; webFull imports the canonical type directly to avoid the silent-drift surface audit risk A explicitly warns against). The `mermaid` and `dompurify` library imports resolve identically from both fork-roots ŌĆö already webFull-tree deps used by `MarkdownRenderer` at the L2.5 lift wave. **Composition shape:** no `Modal` / `ModalFooter` / layer-stack registration ŌĆö this is a fenced-code-block renderer that sits inline inside a markdown surface, NOT a modal. **Theme access pattern:** kept the renderer's `theme: Theme` prop convention, consistent with every L2.x lift. The module-scoped `lastThemeId` cache that keys mermaid re-initialisation on `theme.name` is preserved verbatim ŌĆö same single-instance-per-document constraint as the renderer source. **Parity catalog (`src/webFull/components/MermaidRenderer.parity.test.ts`, 8 stories: 4 happy + 4 negative ŌĆö meets the brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor; 7 catalog-shape vitest guards):** happy-path stories cover the loading-state container with "Rendering diagram..." copy, the error-state card with the canonical "Failed to render Mermaid diagram" header + `details > summary` "View source" affordance + chart `<pre>` body, the rendered-state container with the appended `svg` child, and the whitespace-only-chart short-circuit (skips parse / render and lands on an empty `.mermaid-container`). Negative-path stories cover the no-IPC / no-WS lifecycle pin across mount + parse + render + sanitise, the no-modal-shape pin (error state is an inline card, never `role="dialog"`), the `<details>:not([open])` collapsed-by-default contract, and the `[id^="dmermaid-"]` orphan-cleanup contract (catch-branch removes any mermaid-injected error element from `document.body`). Catalog uses only the allowed assertion vocabulary (`hasElement`, `hasText`, `wsFrameMatches`, `dbHasRow`, `fsHas`, `processHas`, `notificationFired`, `broadcast`); 7/7 catalog-shape vitest guards pass including the presentational-contract pin and a unique-story-name guard. 0 IPC namespaces touched; 0 `src/main/` touches; 0 `src/web/` touches; 0 `src/renderer/` edits; 0 `src/server/` edits. **Files added (all under `src/webFull/`):** `src/webFull/components/MermaidRenderer.tsx` (verbatim lift of the 475-LOC source plus extended header documenting the single import-path adapt, the mermaid-singleton caveat, and the theme-variable budget); `src/webFull/components/MermaidRenderer.parity.test.ts` (8 stories + 7 catalog-shape guards). **Files modified (additive only):** `src/webFull/components/index.ts` ŌĆö appended `export { MermaidRenderer } from './MermaidRenderer';` after the existing `SessionItem` type export under the Layer 2.5 leaf-parade section. **Renderer-side consumers UNTOUCHED:** the renderer's `MarkdownRenderer` / `createMarkdownComponents` continues to import from the renderer module; feature wiring into the webFull tree is a downstream-layer concern. `npm run lint` clean (after `npm run build:prompts` to materialize the pre-existing `src/generated/prompts.ts`); parity-suite 7/7 in-suite assertions pass.
- [ ] ISC-44.layer-2.5.groupchat_modal: `GroupChatModal` (renderer `src/renderer/components/GroupChatModal.tsx`, 498 LOC) ŌĆö **STOPPED at pre-flight on branch `leaf-mermaid-and-groupchat-modal` 2026-06-08** per the brief's "Pre-flight each; STOP that one if module-load IPC" gate. Pre-flight trace: the modal imports `useAgentConfiguration` from `'../hooks/agent'` at module-load top-level (line 23), and `useAgentConfiguration` itself contains 7 `window.maestro.*` calls (`grep -c "window.maestro" src/renderer/hooks/agent/useAgentConfiguration.ts` ŌåÆ 7). That hook is invoked unconditionally at component-top (line 63 of `GroupChatModal.tsx`: `const ac = useAgentConfiguration({ enabled: isOpen, loadSshRemotes: true, autoSelect: false });`), so the IPC surface lands at module-load + first-render ŌĆö exactly the module-load-IPC gate the brief told us to stop on. Additional cross-fork dependency edges that would also need to be resolved before a lift can land: `'./ui'` barrel re-exports `Modal / ModalFooter / FormInput` (the first two are already webFull-side at `src/webFull/components/ui/Modal.tsx`, FormInput at `src/webFull/components/ui/FormInput.tsx`, so a direct `'./ui/Modal'` + `'./ui/FormInput'` import shape would resolve cleanly); `'../../shared/agentMetadata'` (already a shared-tree module ŌĆö resolves from both fork-roots); `'../types'` (would need the standard L2.5 ŌåÆ `'../../shared/theme-types'` swap for `Theme` + a cross-fork edge for `AgentConfig` / `ModeratorConfig` / `GroupChat` to `'../../renderer/types'` until they migrate to `src/shared/`); `'../constants/modalPriorities'` (webFull re-export shim already exists); `'./Wizard/screens/AgentSelectionScreen'` (AGENT_TILES) ŌĆö no webFull lift exists yet; `'./shared/AgentConfigPanel'` (`src/renderer/components/shared/AgentConfigPanel.tsx`) ŌĆö no webFull lift exists; `'./shared/SshRemoteSelector'` (`src/renderer/components/shared/SshRemoteSelector.tsx`) ŌĆö no webFull lift exists; `'../hooks/agent'` (`useAgentConfiguration`) ŌĆö the IPC-bound hook above. **Right move:** unblock this lift behind a webFull-side `useAgentConfiguration` adapter (HTTP- / WebSocket-backed agent-detection + ssh-remote enumeration + agent-config persistence ŌĆö server-side `/api/agents/detect`, `/api/ssh-remotes/list`, `/api/agents/config/{get,set}` routes do not exist yet) and lift the four still-renderer-only collaborators (`AGENT_TILES`, `AgentConfigPanel`, `SshRemoteSelector`, the cross-fork type-only edges for `AgentConfig` / `ModeratorConfig` / `GroupChat`). Until those land, attempting a webFull lift would either drag the full `window.maestro` agent + ssh + settings IPC surface into the webFull tree (the explicit anti-goal of the leaf-parade) or silently emit broken-at-runtime code by stubbing out the hook return shape, which would fail the parity catalog the moment a state assertion ran. The pre-flight gate did its job ŌĆö STOP recorded here, ISC stays `[ ]` open so a future lift can pick it up cleanly once the IPC-adapter precondition is met. See Decisions 2026-06-08 ("Layer 2.5 leaf-parade ŌĆö paired `MermaidRenderer` lift + `GroupChatModal` STOP").
- [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.send_to_agent_modal: `SendToAgentModal` (renderer `src/renderer/components/SendToAgentModal.tsx`, 710 LOC, 0 IPC at module load AND runtime per pre-flight grep) lifted verbatim into `src/webFull/components/SendToAgentModal.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/SendToAgentModal.parity.test.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-send-to-agent-and-prompt-composer` (leaf-parade lift wave; co-bundled with `prompt_composer_modal` in the same PR per the parent brief). Owns: a fuzzy-search input bound to the available session list, arrow-key + 1-9 quick-select keyboard navigation, a token estimate row (source ~tokens + groomed ~73% estimate when `groomContext` is on), a "Clean context" checkbox (default ON), and a Send button that calls `onSend(targetSessionId, options)` and awaits a `MergeResult` before calling `onClose()`. Pre-flight `grep -nE "window\.maestro\.|window\.electron|ipcRenderer|from ['\"]electron['\"]|shell\.openExternal|shell\.openPath|window\.api" src/renderer/components/SendToAgentModal.tsx` ŌåÆ empty (exit 1). All side effects flow through caller-owned prop callbacks (`onClose`, `onSend`). **Import-path adapts (eight, matching the L2.5 cross-fork precedent set by `MergeProgressOverlay` / `SessionItem` / `AgentPromptComposerModal`):** (1) `Theme`, `Session`, `AITab`, `ToolType` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/types'` (cross-fork transitive type-only import; the renderer barrel is canonical for the large `Session` / `AITab` / `ToolType` shapes that are not yet replicated into `src/shared/`). (2) `MergeResult` from `'../types/contextMerge'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/types/contextMerge'` (cross-fork type-only import, matches the `MergeProgressOverlay` precedent of pulling renderer types directly rather than duplicating the type module into the webFull tree). (3) `useLayerStack` from `'../contexts/LayerStackContext'` ŌåÆ `'../contexts/LayerStackContext'` (already a webFull-tree context from the L2.1 layer-stack port ŌĆö no path shift needed). (4) `MODAL_PRIORITIES` from `'../constants/modalPriorities'` ŌåÆ `'../constants/modalPriorities'` (the webFull module is a re-export shim from `src/renderer/constants/modalPriorities.ts` per the established Architect audit-A precedent ŌĆö constants don't diverge across fork-roots). Uses `MODAL_PRIORITIES.SEND_TO_AGENT` (686). (5) `fuzzyMatchWithScore` from `'../utils/search'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/utils/search'` (cross-fork pure-util import; the util is a small pure scoring function with zero IPC reach and zero transitive non-pure deps). (6) `formatTokensCompact` from `'../utils/formatters'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/formatters'` (the renderer-side `formatters.ts` is a pure re-export of the shared module ŌĆö pulling webFull through `src/shared/` directly mirrors the `AgentPromptComposerModal` precedent and eliminates a transitive-import hop). (7) `getAgentIcon` from `'../constants/agentIcons'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/constants/agentIcons'` (cross-fork pure-constant import; the file is a simple map of agent IDs to emoji glyphs with no IPC reach). (8) `ScreenReaderAnnouncement`, `useAnnouncement` from `'./Wizard/ScreenReaderAnnouncement'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/components/Wizard/ScreenReaderAnnouncement'` (cross-fork pure-component import; the component is purely presentational ŌĆö uses ARIA live regions only, no IPC reach. Lifting the full `Wizard/` subtree into webFull is a downstream concern; the `ScreenReaderAnnouncement` leaf-of-a-leaf is consumed nowhere else in webFull today, so the cross-fork edge is the minimal-surface workaround per the `markdownConfig` precedent in `GitDiffViewer`). **Composition shape:** true modal-overlay (`fixed inset-0 z-[9999]`) with layer-stack registration at `MODAL_PRIORITIES.SEND_TO_AGENT` (686), `blocksLowerLayers: true`, `capturesFocus: true`, `focusTrap: 'strict'`, `ariaLabel: 'Send Context to Agent'`, and Escape-to-close wired through an `onCloseRef` ref to avoid re-registering the layer on every parent re-render. `lucide-react` icons (`Search`, `ArrowRight`, `X`, `Loader2`, `Circle`) kept verbatim ŌĆö already a webFull-tree dep. **Theme access pattern:** kept the renderer's `theme: Theme` prop convention, consistent with every L2.x lift. **Parity catalog (`src/webFull/components/SendToAgentModal.parity.test.ts`, 10 stories: 5 happy + 5 negative ŌĆö exceeds the brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor; 7 catalog-shape vitest guards):** happy paths cover the open-state dialog with title + search + listbox + Cancel + Send copy, the target row rendering name + projectRoot + idle status copy, the groom-context checkbox being checked by default + the "After cleaning:" preview row surfacing, source-session exclusion from the listbox, and the empty-state copy ("No other sessions available") when the only candidate is the source. Negative paths cover the closed-state empty-render contract (`isOpen=false` ŌåÆ no dialog mounts), terminal-only session exclusion from the listbox, the Send button being disabled before selection (`canSend === false`), the modal-shape pin (`role="dialog"` + `aria-modal="true"` together ŌĆö guards against silent regression to a non-modal popup), and the no-IPC / no-WS lifecycle pin. 7 in-suite vitest guards (Ōēź3 happy floor; Ōēź1 negative-per-happy floor; allowed-verbs-only; non-empty given/when/then; IPC-leak guard against `window.maestro` / `shell.openpath` / `shell.openexternal` / `dialog.` / `tunnel.` / `ipcrenderer`; unique-story-name guard; modal-contract presence-pin guard) ŌĆö all 7 pass. **Renderer-side consumers UNTOUCHED:** the renderer's `App.tsx` continues to import `from './components/SendToAgentModal'` and render the renderer module; - [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.prompt_composer_modal: `PromptComposerModal` (renderer `src/renderer/components/PromptComposerModal.tsx`, 742 LOC, 0 IPC at module load AND runtime per pre-flight grep) lifted verbatim into `src/webFull/components/PromptComposerModal.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/PromptComposerModal.parity.test.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-send-to-agent-and-prompt-composer` (leaf-parade lift wave; co-bundled with `send_to_agent_modal` in the same PR per the parent brief). Full-viewport (90vw x 80vh) prompt-editor modal used to draft long messages with affordances the inline composer can't comfortably support: multi-line textarea, `@`-mention autocomplete dropdown sourced from `sessions` + `groups`, staged-image thumbnail strip with paste + file-attach + lightbox affordances, and a footer toggle row for Save-to-History, Read-Only mode, Show Thinking (off / on / sticky), and Enter-to-send. Escape closes the modal AFTER persisting the current draft via `onSubmit(value)` (so the draft survives an abrupt close); clicking the backdrop ALSO calls `onSubmit(value)` + `onClose()`; Cmd/Ctrl+Enter sends the prompt; Cmd/Ctrl+S toggles Save-to-History; Cmd/Ctrl+R toggles Read-Only; Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+L opens the lightbox over staged images; Tab inserts a literal tab character (does NOT move focus). Pre-flight `grep -nE "window\.maestro\.|window\.electron|ipcRenderer|from ['\"]electron['\"]|shell\.openExternal|shell\.openPath|window\.api" src/renderer/components/PromptComposerModal.tsx` ŌåÆ empty (exit 1). Every side effect flows through caller-owned prop callbacks (`onSubmit`, `onSend`, `onClose`, `setStagedImages`, `onImageAttachBlocked`, `onOpenLightbox`, `onToggleTabSaveToHistory`, `onToggleTabReadOnlyMode`, `onToggleTabShowThinking`, `onToggleEnterToSend`). **Import-path adapts (seven, matching the L2.5 cross-fork precedent):** (1) `Theme`, `ThinkingMode`, `Session`, `Group` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/types'` (cross-fork transitive type-only import ŌĆö same rationale as `SendToAgentModal`). (2) `useLayerStack` from `'../contexts/LayerStackContext'` ŌåÆ `'../contexts/LayerStackContext'` (already a webFull-tree context ŌĆö no path shift needed). (3) `MODAL_PRIORITIES` from `'../constants/modalPriorities'` ŌåÆ `'../constants/modalPriorities'` (webFull re-export shim ŌĆö no path shift needed). Uses `MODAL_PRIORITIES.PROMPT_COMPOSER` (725). (4) `estimateTokenCount` from `'../../shared/formatters'` ŌåÆ unchanged (path resolves identically from `src/webFull/components/`). (5) `getReadOnlyModeLabel`, `getReadOnlyModeTooltip` from `'../../shared/agentMetadata'` ŌåÆ unchanged (same reason). (6) `formatShortcutKeys`, `formatEnterToSend`, `formatEnterToSendTooltip` from `'../utils/shortcutFormatter'` ŌåÆ `'../utils/shortcutFormatter'` (the webFull module at `src/webFull/utils/shortcutFormatter.ts` mirrors the renderer's public API; no path shift needed). (7) `normalizeMentionName` from `'../utils/participantColors'` ŌåÆ `'../utils/participantColors'` (the webFull module at `src/webFull/utils/participantColors.ts` is the L2.5 verbatim lift of the renderer util; no path shift needed). **Composition shape:** full-viewport prompt-editor modal (90vw x 80vh), NOT a composition of the L2.1 `Modal` primitive ŌĆö the renderer source pre-dates the L2.1 shared-modal extraction and renders its own backdrop + chrome (header with PenLine icon + session name, staged-image strip, expanding textarea, footer with stat chips + toggles + Send button). Layer registration via `useLayerStack` at `MODAL_PRIORITIES.PROMPT_COMPOSER` (725) with `blocksLowerLayers: true`, `capturesFocus: true`, `focusTrap: 'strict'`. Escape behavior is branched on `showMentionsRef`: if the `@`-mention dropdown is open, Escape closes the dropdown only; otherwise Escape persists the draft via `onSubmit(value)` then calls `onClose()`. `lucide-react` icons (`X`, `PenLine`, `Send`, `ImageIcon`, `History`, `Eye`, `Keyboard`, `Brain`, `Pin`, `Users`) kept verbatim ŌĆö already a webFull-tree dep. **Theme access pattern:** kept the renderer's `theme: Theme` prop convention, consistent with every L2.x lift. **Parity catalog (`src/webFull/components/PromptComposerModal.parity.test.ts`, 11 stories: 5 happy + 6 negative ŌĆö exceeds the brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor; 7 catalog-shape vitest guards):** happy paths cover the open-state header + textarea + Send button copy, the no-mentions placeholder ("Write your prompt here..." when `sessions` is undefined), the with-mentions placeholder ("Write your prompt here... (@ to mention agent)" when `sessions` is provided), the footer toggle chips surfacing when their callbacks are provided ("History", "Read-Only", "Save to History" tooltip), and the character + token count chips surfacing with the canonical formatter copy ("5 characters" + "tokens" suffix). Negative paths cover the closed-state empty-render contract (`isOpen=false` ŌåÆ no header copy, no textarea), the Send button being disabled when `value.trim()` is empty (`disabled={!value.trim()}`), the image-attach affordance being suppressed when `setStagedImages` is undefined (gates both the "Attach Image" button and the hidden file input), the Show Thinking toggle being suppressed when `supportsThinking=false` (per the `supportsThinking && onToggleTabShowThinking` gate), the no-IPC / no-WS lifecycle pin, and the Close-(Escape) X affordance carrying the canonical title="Close (Escape)" copy (presence pin against silent accessibility regression). 7 in-suite vitest guards (Ōēź3 happy floor; Ōēź1 negative-per-happy floor; allowed-verbs-only; non-empty given/when/then; IPC-leak guard against `window.maestro` / `shell.openpath` / `shell.openexternal` / `dialog.` / `tunnel.` / `ipcrenderer`; unique-story-name guard; closed-state empty-render contract presence-pin guard) ŌĆö all 7 pass. **Renderer-side consumers UNTOUCHED:** the renderer's `App.tsx` continues to import `from './components/PromptComposerModal'` and render the renderer module; feature wiring into the webFull tree is a downstream-layer concern. **Files added (all under `src/webFull/`):** `src/webFull/components/PromptComposerModal.tsx` (verbatim lift of the 742-LOC source plus an extended header documenting all seven import-path adapts and the cross-fork-precedent rationale); - [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.session_item: `SessionItem` (renderer `src/renderer/components/SessionItem.tsx`, 360 LOC, 0 IPC at module load, 0 Electron-only API per pre-flight grep) lifted verbatim into `src/webFull/components/SessionItem.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/SessionItem.parity.test.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-session-item` (leaf-parade lift wave). Renderer's unified per-agent row primitive used inside the Left Bar (`SessionList`) for ALL list contexts ŌĆö `bookmark` / `group` / `flat` / `ungrouped` / `worktree` rows behind one `variant` discriminant. **Not a replacement for the earlier L2.5 `SessionListItem` lift** ŌĆö that file is the narrower render-shape-oriented row the webFull L4.1 SessionList catalog asserts against (status dot + name + AI/Ōīś pill, status-color via `<StatusDot>`); `SessionItem` carries the FULL renderer feature surface (worktree variant, bookmark variant, group badge, jump-number badge, git-dirty indicator, location pills (`GIT` / `LOCAL` / `REMOTE` / SSH server-icon), `AUTO` Auto-Run pill, `ERR` agent-error pill, bookmark toggle, AI status dot with `claude-code`-no-session hollow-ring branch, unread badge, inline rename input, drag-and-drop affordances). Shipping it here lets a downstream `SessionList` re-architecture swap the lighter row shape for this richer one without re-lifting code. Pre-flight `grep -nE "window\.maestro\.|window\.electron|ipcRenderer|from ['\"]electron['\"]|shell\.openExternal|shell\.openPath|window\.api" src/renderer/components/SessionItem.tsx` ŌåÆ empty (exit 1). The component is purely presentational ŌĆö no `useState`, no `useEffect`, no DOM-level side effects of its own; every side effect (`onSelect`, `onDragStart`, `onDragOver`, `onDrop`, `onContextMenu`, `onFinishRename`, `onStartRename`, `onToggleBookmark`) flows through caller-owned prop callbacks. **Import-path adapts (two, matching the L2.5 cross-fork precedent set by `ParticipantCard` / `GroupChatPanel` / `MergeProgressOverlay`):** (1) `Session`, `Group`, `Theme` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/types'` (cross-fork transitive type-only import; the renderer barrel is canonical for the large `Session` / `Group` shapes that are not yet replicated into `src/shared/` ŌĆö matches the `GroupChatHeader` / `GroupChatPanel` / `ParticipantCard` precedent of importing renderer-aggregator types directly. `Theme` could route through `'../../shared/theme-types'` directly per the standard L2.5 swap, but keeping all three on the same `'../../renderer/types'` line preserves source fidelity to the original single-line import and `Theme` resolves through the renderer aggregator to the canonical shared definition anyway); (2) `getStatusColor` from `'../utils/theme'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/utils/theme'` (pure renderer helper that maps `SessionState ŌåÆ ThemeColor` ŌĆö same cross-fork transitive-import shape used by `ParticipantCard`). **Composition shape:** no `Modal` / `ModalFooter` / layer-stack registration ŌĆö this is an inline row primitive, NOT a modal. `lucide-react` icons (`Activity`, `GitBranch`, `Bot`, `Bookmark`, `AlertCircle`, `Server`) kept verbatim ŌĆö already a webFull-tree dep used by every L2.5 sibling. **Theme access pattern:** kept the renderer's `theme: Theme` prop convention, consistent with every L2.x lift. **Distinguishing features preserved verbatim:** variant-aware container className branching (`flat` uses `mx-3` + rounded; `worktree` uses `pl-8 pr-4` + smaller font + suppresses the metadata row; the other three use `px-4 py-2`); HTML5 drag-and-drop affordances (`draggable` attribute + `onDragStart` / `onDragOver` / `onDrop` callbacks; the catalog asserts the `draggable="true"` attribute presence but leaves drag-state mutation to the parent `SessionList` catalog); inline rename input auto-focuses on `isEditing` with Enter-to-commit / blur-to-commit; bookmark icon is always filled for the bookmark variant and toggles between filled / outline on the other variants behind a `group-hover:opacity-100` hover-reveal; worktree children inherit bookmark status from their parent and gate the toggle button behind `!session.parentSessionId`; the location-pill ladder is suppressed for the bookmark variant, the worktree variant, AND terminal sessions (per the renderer source's `variant !== 'bookmark' && variant !== 'worktree' && session.toolType !== 'terminal'` predicate); the AI status dot uses a hollow ring (`border` + `transparent` backgroundColor) when `toolType === 'claude-code'` AND no `agentSessionId` AND `!isInBatch` ŌĆö this is the "No active Claude session" placeholder branch; unread badge is gated on `!isActive && session.aiTabs?.some(tab => tab.hasUnread)` so active rows do not leak the badge. **Parity catalog (`src/webFull/components/SessionItem.parity.test.ts`, 15 stories: 8 happy + 7 negative ŌĆö comfortably exceeds the brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor; 7 catalog-shape vitest guards):** happy paths cover the flat-variant draggable row with name + toolType metadata, the bookmark variant rendering filled bookmark icon + group badge, the worktree variant suppressing the metadata row + adding the branch glyph, the `AUTO` pill surfacing with `title="Auto Run active"` when `isInBatch=true`, the `ERR` pill surfacing with `title="Error: <msg>"` when `session.agentError` is set, the inline rename input mounting when `isEditing=true`, the jump-number badge surfacing when `jumpNumber` is provided, and the `GIT` pill surfacing with `title="Git repository"` for git-repo sessions in non-bookmark / non-worktree variants. Negative paths cover the location-pill suppression for terminal sessions (per the `!== 'terminal'` predicate), `AUTO` pill suppression when `isInBatch=false`, `ERR` pill suppression when `agentError` is absent, inline rename input suppression when `isEditing=false`, `GIT` pill suppression in the bookmark variant even for git repos (per the `variant !== 'bookmark'` guard), bookmark toggle suppression in the worktree variant (per the `!session.parentSessionId` guard ŌĆö worktree children inherit from parent), and unread badge suppression when the row IS active (per the `!isActive` guard). Catalog uses only the allowed assertion vocabulary (`hasElement`, `hasText`, `wsFrameMatches`, `dbHasRow`, `fsHas`, `processHas`, `notificationFired`, `broadcast`) and stays render-shape oriented (hasElement / hasText only) since SessionItem is purely presentational ŌĆö click + drag + rename + bookmark-toggle wiring is asserted by the parent `SessionList` parity catalog where the callbacks are bound. 7 in-suite vitest guards (Ōēź3 happy floor; Ōēź1 negative-per-happy floor; allowed-verbs-only; non-empty given/when/then; IPC-leak guard against `window.maestro` / `shell.openpath` / `shell.openexternal` / `dialog.` / `tunnel.` / `ipcrenderer`; render-shape-only guard restricting `then` verbs to `hasElement` / `hasText`; and a unique-story-name guard) ŌĆö all 7 pass. **Renderer-side consumers UNTOUCHED:** the renderer's `SessionList` (`src/renderer/components/SessionList/SessionList.tsx`) continues to import from `'../SessionItem'` and render the renderer module; feature wiring into the webFull tree is a downstream-layer concern (the webFull L4.1 SessionList lift still consumes the lighter `SessionListItem` shape ŌĆö swapping in `SessionItem` is a behavior expansion that the L4.1 catalog would need extended for, and is intentionally out of scope here). **Files added (all under `src/webFull/`):** `src/webFull/components/SessionItem.tsx` (verbatim lift of the 360-LOC source plus an extended header documenting the two import-path adapts, the cross-fork-precedent rationale, the "not a replacement for `SessionListItem`" framing, and the full IN-scope feature list); `src/webFull/components/SessionItem.parity.test.ts` (~420 LOC, 15 stories + 7 catalog-shape guards). **Files modified (additive only):** `src/webFull/components/index.ts` ŌĆö appended `export { SessionItem } from './SessionItem';` + `export type { SessionItemProps, SessionItemVariant } from './SessionItem';` after the existing `MergeProgressOverlay` export under the Layer 2.5 leaf-parade section. **Files NOT touched:** `src/web/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/renderer/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/main/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/server/` (zero bytes diff vs main). See Decisions 2026-06-08 ("Layer 2.5 leaf-parade ŌĆö `SessionItem` lift").
- [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.groupchat_list: `GroupChatList` (renderer `src/renderer/components/GroupChatList.tsx`, 416 LOC, 0 IPC, 0 Electron-only API per pre-flight grep) lifted verbatim into `src/webFull/components/GroupChatList.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/GroupChatList.parity.test.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-groupchat-list` (leaf-parade lift wave, left-panel collapsible list of Group Chats ŌĆö direct sibling of the already-merged L2.5 GroupChat module lifts `GroupChatPanel`, `GroupChatHeader`, `GroupChatMessages`, `GroupChatInput`; this lift completes the GroupChat component surface in `src/webFull/` modulo deferred feature wiring). Pre-flight `grep -E "window\.maestro\.|from ['\"]electron['\"]|shell\.openExternal|shell\.openPath|ipcRenderer" src/renderer/components/GroupChatList.tsx` ŌåÆ empty (exit 1). The component itself touches none of the banned surface; all side effects are delivered via prop callbacks (`onOpenGroupChat`, `onNewGroupChat`, `onEditGroupChat`, `onRenameGroupChat`, `onDeleteGroupChat`, `onArchiveGroupChat`, `onExpandedChange`) which the host wires to its own runtime. **Import-path adapts (five, matching the L2.5 cross-fork precedent set by `SessionItem` / `ParticipantCard` / `SessionActivityGraph` / `AgentPromptComposerModal`):** (1) `Theme` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/theme-types'` (standard L2.5 swap ŌĆö the renderer aggregator at `src/renderer/types/index.ts` re-exports `Theme` from `src/shared/theme-types`, webFull pulls direct from the canonical source); (2) `GroupChat` + `GroupChatState` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/group-chat-types'` (canonical source ŌĆö the renderer barrel re-exports from there anyway; same swap every L2.5 GroupChat sibling lift made); (3) `useClickOutside` from `'../hooks'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/hooks/ui/useClickOutside'` (pure renderer hook ŌĆö no `window.maestro`, no `electron`, no `ipcRenderer` per source-file inspection; only consumes `useEffect` + DOM `mousedown` / `touchstart` listeners; matches the `AgentPromptComposerModal` L2.5 precedent of importing pure presentation hooks directly by relative path); (4) `useContextMenuPosition` from `'../hooks'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/hooks/ui/useContextMenuPosition'` (pure renderer hook ŌĆö uses `useLayoutEffect` + `useState` + `window` bounding-rect math only, no `window.maestro`, no Electron-only API; matches the `SessionActivityGraph` L2.5 precedent); (5) `getStatusColor` from `'../utils/theme'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/utils/theme'` (pure renderer helper that maps `SessionState ŌåÆ ThemeColor`; matches `SessionItem` / `ParticipantCard` precedent ŌĆö duplicating the helper into the webFull tree would create the silent-drift surface the parade's audit risk A explicitly warns against). **Composition shape:** outer `border-t mt-4` wrapper; collapsible header with chevron + MessageSquare glyph + "Group Chats" copy + optional active-count badge + optional archived-toggle pill + canonical "+ New Chat" pill (titled "New Group Chat"); expanded body renders a `border-l ml-4` rail of chat rows sorted by `updatedAt ?? createdAt` desc (when `showArchived=true`, active chats group above archived); each chat row carries MessageSquare/Archive icon + name + optional participant-count pill (pluralized: `"3 participants"` / `"1 participant"`) + status dot on right (idle = success colour with "Idle" tooltip, busy = warning colour with "Thinking..." tooltip + `animate-pulse`); right-click on a row opens a positioned-via-`useContextMenuPosition` context menu offering Edit / Rename / Archive (when supported) / Delete; empty state differentiates `"No group chats yet"` (when `groupChats.length === 0`) from `"All group chats are archived"` (when filter hides all non-archived chats). **Theme access pattern:** kept the renderer's `theme: Theme` prop convention, consistent with every L2.x lift. **Controlled-vs-uncontrolled expansion preserved verbatim:** the `isExpanded` / `onExpandedChange` props let the host lift the expanded state for keyboard navigation, or omit them to use internal state (default: expanded when `groupChats.length > 0`); the auto-expand-on-new-chat effect (`prevCountRef` + `useEffect`) is preserved verbatim. **Status indicator mapping preserved verbatim:** the busy flag fires when the active chat's `groupChatState !== 'idle'` OR any participant in the active chat's `participantStates` map is `'working'` (or ŌĆö for non-active rows ŌĆö when the per-chat `groupChatStates.get(id) !== 'idle'` OR any value in `allGroupChatParticipantStates.get(id)` is `'working'`); `getStatusColor` is called with the discriminated `'busy'` / `'idle'` SessionState to map to the theme colour. **Parity catalog (`src/webFull/components/GroupChatList.parity.test.ts`, 12 stories: 6 happy + 6 negative ŌĆö comfortably exceeds the brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor; 8 catalog-shape vitest guards):** happy paths cover the baseline header + "+ New Chat" pill rendering, the count badge surfacing when `activeCount > 0`, a chat row rendering with its name + canonical participant-pill title, the status-dot tooltip flipping to "Thinking..." under non-idle state, the empty-state "No group chats yet" copy when `groupChats.length === 0`, and the archived-toggle pill surfacing with its canonical `"Show 1 archived chat"` title when `onArchiveGroupChat` is supplied + `archivedCount > 0`. Negative paths cover the count-badge suppression when `activeCount === 0` (cross-pinned with the "no chats" empty-state to prove the badge branch did not fire), the singular `"1 participant"` title for `participants.length === 1`, the status-dot "Idle" tooltip under `groupChatState === 'idle'`, the differentiated `"All group chats are archived"` empty-state when the archived filter hides all chats, the archived-toggle pill suppression when there are zero archived chats to unhide, and the context-menu surface NOT being rendered on initial mount (cross-pinned through both the canonical Edit and Delete button absence ŌĆö both only exist inside the context menu). Catalog uses only the allowed assertion vocabulary (`hasElement`, `hasText`, `wsFrameMatches`, `dbHasRow`, `fsHas`, `processHas`, `notificationFired`, `broadcast`) and stays render-shape oriented (`hasElement` / `hasText` only) since GroupChatList is purely presentational ŌĆö click + right-click + new-chat + open + archive-toggle wiring is asserted by the parent feature-consumer catalog where the callbacks are bound. 8 in-suite vitest guards (Ōēź3 floor on story count; Ōēź3 happy floor; Ōēź1 negative-per-happy floor; allowed-verbs-only; non-empty given/when/then; IPC-leak guard against `window.maestro` / `shell.openpath` / `shell.openexternal` / `dialog.` / `tunnel.` / `ipcrenderer`; render-shape-only guard restricting `then` verbs to `hasElement` / `hasText`; unique-story-name guard) ŌĆö all 8 pass. **Renderer-side consumers UNTOUCHED:** the renderer's left-bar host (`src/renderer/components/SessionList/`) continues to import from `'../GroupChatList'` and render the renderer module; feature wiring into the webFull tree is a downstream-layer concern (the eventual webFull left-bar lift will be the consumer that mounts the webFull `GroupChatList` and threads its callbacks to host runtime). The deferred-layer-4.1 ISC `ISC-44.layer-4.1.group_chats_panel` (line 182) tracks that downstream wiring and remains DEFERRED ŌĆö this lift covers the component leaf, not the panel-wiring layer. **Files added (all under `src/webFull/`):** `src/webFull/components/GroupChatList.tsx` (verbatim lift of the 416-LOC source plus an extended header documenting the five import-path adapts, the cross-fork-precedent rationale, and the "feature wiring is a downstream-layer concern" framing); `src/webFull/components/GroupChatList.parity.test.ts` (~270 LOC, 12 stories + 8 catalog-shape guards). **Files modified (additive only):** `src/webFull/components/index.ts` ŌĆö appended `export { GroupChatList } from './GroupChatList';` + `export type { GroupChatListProps } from './GroupChatList';` after the existing `SessionItem` export under the Layer 2.5 leaf-parade section. **Files NOT touched:** `src/web/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/renderer/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/main/` (zero bytes diff vs main); `src/server/` (zero bytes diff vs main). **Verification:** `npm run lint` clean (after `npm run build:prompts` to materialize the pre-existing `src/generated/prompts.ts`); `npx vitest run src/webFull/components/GroupChatList.parity.test.ts` ŌåÆ 8/8 catalog-shape tests passed; `npx vitest run src/webFull/components/GroupChat` (regression across all five GroupChat catalogs) ŌåÆ 34/34 passed. **Not pushed per brief instruction** ŌĆö branch sits locally at `leaf-groupchat-list`, awaiting Trillium's merge.
- [x] ISC-44.layer-2.5.file_search_modal: `FileSearchModal` (renderer `src/renderer/components/FileSearchModal.tsx`, 551 LOC, 0 IPC, 0 Electron-only API per pre-flight grep `grep -E "window\.maestro\.|from ['\"]electron['\"]|shell\.openExternal|shell\.openPath|ipcRenderer" src/renderer/components/FileSearchModal.tsx` ŌåÆ empty exit 1) lifted verbatim into `src/webFull/components/FileSearchModal.tsx` with parity catalog at `src/webFull/components/FileSearchModal.parity.test.ts`. **CLOSED 2026-06-08** on branch `leaf-file-search-and-ai-commands` (leaf-parade lift wave ŌĆö paired with `AICommandsPanel` in a single atomic commit). Fuzzy file picker rendered as a centered `role="dialog"` `aria-modal="true"` panel; registers with the LayerStack at `MODAL_PRIORITIES.FUZZY_FILE_SEARCH` (`focusTrap: 'strict'`, `blocksLowerLayers: true`, `capturesFocus: true`); supports arrow-key navigation, Cmd+1..9/0 quick-select hotkeys, Tab toggle between "Visible Files" (only files in expanded folders, mirroring file-explorer visibility) and "All Files" (entire tree), and a recursive `flattenPreviewableFiles` helper that filters to a curated allowlist of code/markup/docs/image extensions plus special filenames (`Makefile`, `Dockerfile`, `.gitignore`, etc.). All side effects flow through the `onFileSelect` / `onClose` prop callbacks. **Six import-path adapts matching the L2.5 cross-fork precedent:** (1) `Theme` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/theme-types'` (standard L2.5 swap; renderer aggregator re-exports the canonical type from `src/shared/theme-types`); (2) `Shortcut` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/types'` (cross-fork transitive type-only import, matching `GroupChatInput` / `KeyboardMasteryCelebration` precedent ŌĆö `Shortcut` is not yet replicated to `src/shared/`); (3) `FileNode` from `'../types/fileTree'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/types/fileTree'` (same cross-fork shape; `fileTree.ts` is six lines of pure interface declarations); (4) `fuzzyMatchWithScore` from `'../utils/search'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/utils/search'` (pure renderer helper, string-only fuzzy scorer, zero `window.maestro` / Electron / IPC references ŌĆö matches `getStatusColor` / `useTemplateAutocomplete` precedent); (5) `useLayerStack` from `'../contexts/LayerStackContext'` ŌåÆ `'../contexts/LayerStackContext'` (webFull already carries its own L2.1 lift of `LayerStackContext`); (6) `MODAL_PRIORITIES` from `'../constants/modalPriorities'` ŌåÆ `'../constants/modalPriorities'` (webFull re-export per Architect audit risk A ŌĆö modal priorities don't diverge); (7) `formatShortcutKeys` from `'../utils/shortcutFormatter'` ŌåÆ `'../utils/shortcutFormatter'` (webFull already carries a pure-mirror shortcutFormatter per `KeyboardMasteryCelebration` precedent). **Composition shape:** modal-shape ŌĆö registers with LayerStack at the FUZZY_FILE_SEARCH priority; the dialog root is `role="dialog"` `aria-modal="true"` `aria-label="Fuzzy File Search"` in a `fixed inset-0` overlay; the search input auto-focuses on mount via `setTimeout(50)`. `lucide-react` icons (`Search`, `File`, `FileImage`, `FileText`) kept verbatim ŌĆö already a webFull-tree dep. **Theme access pattern:** `theme: Theme` prop, consistent with every L2.x lift. **Parity catalog (`src/webFull/components/FileSearchModal.parity.test.ts`, 11 stories: 5 happy + 6 negative ŌĆö meets the brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor; 6 catalog-shape vitest guards):** happy paths cover the dialog chrome with aria-label + search-input placeholder + ESC badge, the mode-toggle pills with live "Visible Files (N)" / "All Files (N)" counts and the "Tab to switch" hint, the per-row file name + directory subtitle, the footer "N files" + navigation/select/quick-select hint copy, and the conditional `span.font-mono` shortcut hint when the `shortcut` prop is supplied. Negative paths cover the empty-state "No files to search" copy when the tree is empty, the "No files match your search" copy when search has no hits, the shortcut-hint suppression when `shortcut` prop is absent (a future refactor unconditionally rendering it would silently track), filtering of non-previewable files (e.g. `binary.bin`) by `isPreviewableFile`, the zero-count footer copy on an empty tree, and the no-IPC / no-WS lifecycle pin. 6/6 catalog-shape vitest guards pass (`describe ... ŌĆö parity catalog`: Ōēź3 happy floor; Ōēź1 negative-per-happy floor; allowed-verbs-only; non-empty given/when/then; IPC-leak guard against `window.maestro` / `shell.openpath` / `shell.openexternal` / `dialog.` / `tunnel.` / `ipcrenderer`; unique-story-name guard). 0 IPC touches; 0 `src/main/` / `src/web/` / `src/renderer/` / `src/server/` edits. Built-in commands can be edited but not deleted (a `Lock` badge surfaces the read-only-delete state). Persistence is the caller's job ŌĆö all side effects flow through the `setCustomAICommands` prop callback. **Four import-path adapts matching the L2.5 cross-fork precedent:** (1) `Theme` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../shared/theme-types'` (standard L2.5 swap); (2) `CustomAICommand` from `'../types'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/types'` (cross-fork transitive type-only import ŌĆö `CustomAICommand` is not yet replicated to `src/shared/`; matches `GroupChatInput` / `SessionItem` / `KeyboardMasteryCelebration` precedent); (3) `TEMPLATE_VARIABLES_GENERAL` from `'../utils/templateVariables'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/utils/templateVariables'` (pure renderer constant ŌĆö array of `{ variable, description }` rows; zero `window.maestro` / Electron / IPC references); (4) `useTemplateAutocomplete` from `'../hooks'` ŌåÆ `'../../renderer/hooks/input/useTemplateAutocomplete'` (pure renderer hook ŌĆö `useState` + `useEffect` + `useRef` + DOM bounding-rect math only; zero IPC; pulled direct from renderer source path rather than the renderer barrel to keep the import surface narrow per L2.5 precedent). The local `TemplateAutocompleteDropdown` import resolves cleanly inside webFull (the L2.5 sibling lift already carries the webFull version). **Composition shape:** NOT a modal ŌĆö this is an inline settings-pane editor with no `Modal` / `ModalFooter` / layer-stack registration. The disclosure for each command is a `<button>` that toggles a `Set<string>` of expanded IDs. The "Template Variables" reference accordion is a separate `<button>` + `<div>` collapsible. `TemplateAutocompleteDropdown` is rendered twice (once for the new-command form, once for the inline edit mode) ŌĆö both are gated on the `autocompleteState.isOpen` state owned by `useTemplateAutocomplete`. `lucide-react` icons (`Plus`, `Trash2`, `Edit2`, `Save`, `X`, `Terminal`, `Lock`, `ChevronDown`, `ChevronRight`, `Variable`) kept verbatim ŌĆö already a webFull-tree dep. **Theme access pattern:** `theme: Theme` prop, consistent with every L2.x lift. **Parity catalog (`src/webFull/components/AICommandsPanel.parity.test.ts`, 11 stories: 5 happy + 6 negative ŌĆö meets the brief's "Ōēź3 happy + Ōēź1 negative-per-happy" floor; 6 catalog-shape vitest guards):** happy paths cover the header copy ("Custom AI Commands" + the verbatim subtitle) and the "Template Variables" disclosure label, the "Add Command" button when not in creation mode, the empty-state copy + "Create your first command" CTA when no commands, the per-command rows surfacing both command name and description (regardless of sort order ŌĆö sort is a layout concern enforced by the renderer source), and the Built-in badge with `svg.lucide-lock` icon for built-in commands. Negative paths cover suppression of the empty-state when commands are present, suppression of the `title="Delete command"` affordance for built-in commands (the catalog pins the "Edit but not Delete" contract via absence-only assertions to stay state-driving-free), suppression of the "Add Command" button while in creation mode, suppression of the empty-state CTA while creating with zero commands, suppression of the Built-in badge for user-created commands, and the no-IPC / no-WS lifecycle pin. 6/6 catalog-shape vitest guards pass (same shape as the `FileSearchModal` catalog). 0 IPC touches; 0 `src/main/` / `src/web/` / `src/renderer/` / `src/server/` edits.
